items.desc_en: Ukon beverage prepared for religious ceremonies and seasonal festivals to purify participants spiritually and physically. Represents sacred integration of therapeutic herb into religious practice and community wellness.
items.desc_ja: 宗教儀式や季節祭礼でウコン飲料を調製し、参加者を精神的・肉体的に浄化。治療用草本の宗教実践への統合。

items.title_ja: よもぎの出産痛軽減香気
items.desc_en: Yomogi leaves burned to release aromatic compounds during labor, providing pain relief and encouraging easier delivery. Combines pharmacological effects with psychological comfort in birthing environments.
items.desc_ja: 出産時によもぎの葉を焚いて香気成分を放出させ、痛み軽減と分娩促進。薬理効果と心理的快適性を統合。

items.title_en: Habu Dry-Heat Therapy for Muscular Tension
items.title_ja: ハブ乾熱療法での筋肉緊張
items.desc_en: Habu snake preparations combined with heated applications to release muscular tension, improve circulation, and restore mobility in aged practitioners. Specialized knowledge required for safe therapeutic integration.
items.desc_ja: ハブ製剤を加温療法と組み合わせ、筋肉緊張解放、血流改善、高齢者の可動性復元。安全な統合に専門知識が必須。

items.title_en: Sakuna (Long Pepper) Root Decoction for Digestive Vitality
items.title_ja: サクナ根の煎じ液による消化活力
items.desc_en: Sakuna root decoction prepared by slow-simmering dried roots to treat chronic digestive weakness, appetite loss, and intestinal sluggishness. Consumed warm before meals during cooler months. The bitter compounds stimulate gastric secretions and strengthen digestive fire in Okinawan humoral theory.
items.desc_ja: 乾燥したサクナの根をゆっくり煎じ、慢性的な消化不全や食欲不振に対処。冷涼期に食前に温かく摂取し、消化力を強化する民間療法。

items.title_ja: ハンダマの産後造血補助療法
items.desc_en: Fresh handama leaves cooked into iron-rich broths administered to postpartum mothers during the traditional forty-day recovery period. The purple pigment and mineral density address blood loss and prevent postpartum anemia. Part of sanba midwife protocols passed through female lineages.
items.desc_ja: 産後40日間の回復期に新鮮なハンダマの葉を鉄分豊富なスープにして産婦に提供。血液喪失と産褥期貧血を防ぐ助産婦の伝統的処方。

items.title_en: Sea Cucumber (Namako) Collagen Extraction for Joint Flexibility
items.title_ja: ナマコのコラーゲン抽出による関節柔軟性
items.desc_en: Dried sea cucumber stewed for twelve hours with ginger and medicinal mushrooms to extract collagen and glucosamine-rich broth. Traditionally consumed by fishermen and elderly to prevent arthritis and maintain flexibility. Seasonal harvest timing affects potency levels.
items.desc_ja: 乾燥ナマコを12時間生姜と薬用キノコで煮詰めてコラーゲン抽出液を製造。漁民と高齢者が関節炎予防に摂取する。季節的収穫タイミングで効力が変動。

items.title_en: Habu Bite Emergency Tourniquet and Herbal Stone Poultice Protocol
items.title_ja: ハブ咬傷の駆血帯とハーバル石膏処置
items.desc_en: Traditional layered emergency response combining immediate tourniquet application above bite with heated stone poultices infused with nigana and mugwort to draw venom. Specific stone heating techniques and timing protocols developed over centuries of agricultural community knowledge.
items.desc_ja: 咬傷部位上部の駆血帯と、ニガナとヨモギを含浸させた加熱石膏による毒素吸出の複合療法。農業社会で代々開発された石加熱技術と処置タイミング。

items.title_en: Tegumi Deep-Tissue Hand Technique for Meridian Restoration
items.title_ja: テグミ経絡復元型深部組織手技
items.desc_en: Specialized Okinawan palm and finger pressure technique targeting energy meridians and muscular adhesions developed among Ryukyu martial communities. Combines acupressure knowledge with tissue manipulation to restore circulation and resolve chronic tension patterns.
items.desc_ja: 琉球武術コミュニティ由来の手掌指圧技法で、経絡とテンション癒着に対応。鍼圧知識と組織マニピュレーション技を統合し循環復元。

items.title_en: Yuta Ancestral Grief Counseling and Spirit Distress Resolution
items.title_ja: ユタによる祖先喪失感と霊的苦悩の解決
items.desc_en: Female spiritual practitioners (yuta) employing trance-communication with deceased ancestors to address unresolved grief, family conflict, and ancestor-related distress. Incorporates diagnostic divination, ritual offerings, and ancestral message delivery as comprehensive mental health intervention.
items.desc_ja: 女性霊能者(ユタ)が故人との交信トランス状態で未解決の喪失感や祖先関連の苦悩を対処。診断卜占、儀式供物、メッセージ伝達を含む総合的精神衛生介入。

items.title_en: Deep Seawater Mineral Therapy for Immune System Fortification
items.title_ja: 深海水ミネラル療法による免疫強化
items.desc_en: Harvesting mineral-rich water from deep oceanic layers for diluted consumption addressing mineral deficiencies and immune dysfunction. Traditional knowledge recognizes specific seasonal deep-water mineral compositions optimal for different health conditions throughout the year.
items.desc_ja: 深海層から採取した鉱物豊富な海水を希釈して摂取し、鉱物欠乏と免疫機能障害に対処。季節ごとの深海水鉱物組成と健康条件の最適性を認識。

items.title_en: Goat Meat Stamina Soup for Reproductive and Physical Vigor
items.title_ja: 山羊肉スタミナスープの生殖・身体活力化
items.desc_en: Slow-boiled goat soup with warming spices consumed during agricultural peak seasons to enhance reproductive vitality and physical endurance. Believed to restore yang-energy depleted through intense labor. Traditionally prepared communally for harvest season workers.
items.desc_ja: 温性香辛料と一緒に低温煮沸した山羊スープを農業繁忙期に摂取し、生殖活力と身体耐久性を増進。労働で消費されたヤン気を復元するとされる。

items.title_en: Typhoon Preparation Mugwort Sachet Ritual for Weather Resilience
items.title_ja: 台風準備ヨモギ香袋による気象耐性儀式
items.desc_en: Pre-typhoon season creation of dried mugwort sachets hung throughout homes to strengthen respiratory health against barometric pressure changes and wind-borne pathogens. Ritual preparation dates align with lunar calendar and traditional storm arrival predictions.
items.desc_ja: 台風前シーズンのドライヨモギ香袋製作を家屋全体に掛け、気圧変化と風媒性病原体への呼吸健康耐性を強化。儀式準備日程は陰暦と伝統的風害予測に同期。

items.title_en: Pig Blood Soup (Chirasshi) for Iron Deficiency and Menstrual Recovery
items.title_ja: チラシ豚血スープによる鉄欠乏と月経回復
items.desc_en: Traditional preparation of pig blood cooked with bitter greens and healing herbs specifically addressing iron deficiency anemia and post-menstrual weakness. Consumed during vulnerable periods following heavy menstruation or childbirth. Ritual consumption timing follows lunar menstrual cycles.
items.desc_ja: 苦味野菜と薬草と共に煮込んだ豚血で鉄欠乏性貧血と月経後虚弱に対応。月経過多や産後の脆弱期に摂取。摂食タイミングは陰暦月経周期に準拠。

items.title_en: Handama Leaf Fermentation for Digestive Restoration
items.title_ja: ハンダマ葉の発酵療法による消化機能回復
items.desc_en: Purple spinach leaves (handama) fermented in clay vessels for 40 days, then consumed as bitter tonic to restore digestive fire after illness, particularly postpartum. The fermentation process concentrates iron and antioxidants while reducing oxalates through natural lactobacillus action.
items.desc_ja: ハンダマを土器に漬け込み40日間発酵させた苦味強化トニック。出産後の消化機能回復に特に有効。発酵過程で鉄分と抗酸化物質が濃縮される。

items.title_en: Habu Venom Neutralization Through Mountain Stone Ritual
items.title_ja: ハブ毒中和の山石儀式療法
items.desc_en: Specific river stones collected from sacred mountain streams, heated and applied directly to habu snake bite wounds. Stone selection involves ritualized gathering with prayers; heat application draws venom outward while spiritual protection prevents infection and shock cascade.
items.desc_ja: 神聖な山の川から採集した特定の石を加熱してハブ咬傷に直接適用。儀式的採集と祈りを伴う。熱により毒液を外側へ引き出し、精神的保護が感染と衝撃を防ぐ。

items.title_en: Goat Bone Broth Stamina Protocol for Physical Labor
items.title_ja: 労働体力強化のためのヤギ骨髄スープ儀式
items.desc_en: Whole goat bones simmered for 18 hours with ginger, mugwort, and sea salt, creating collagen-rich broth consumed before intensive farm work. Timing follows lunar cycles; consumed during waxing moon for strength accumulation, waning moon for recovery.
items.desc_ja: ヤギの全骨を18時間煮込んだコラーゲン豊富なスープ。生姜、ヨモギ、海塩を使用。農作業前に飲用。満月周期で強度蓄積、新月で回復。

items.title_en: Nigana Bitter Herb Liver Cleansing Seasonal Detox
items.title_ja: ニガナ苦味ハーブの季節的肝臓浄化療法
items.desc_en: Wild bitter herb (nigana) harvested during spring equinox, dried, and brewed as strong tea consumed for seven consecutive mornings. Bitter compounds stimulate bile production and hepatic enzyme activation, traditionally timed before rainy season to prevent parasitic infection.
items.desc_ja: 春分採集の野生ニガナを乾燥させたお茶。連続7朝飲用。苦味成分は胆汁生成と肝酵素活性化を促進。雨季前の寄生虫感染予防に従来タイミング設定。

items.title_en: Sakuna Long Pepper Root Warming for Childbirth Preparation
items.title_ja: サクナ長コショウ根の出産準備温熱療法
items.desc_en: Dried roots of sakuna (命草) steeped in warm water and used as abdominal compress during final month of pregnancy. Warming action improves uterine blood circulation, facilitates placental positioning, and prepares tissues for labor through gentle capsaicin stimulation.
items.desc_ja: サクナ乾燥根を温水に浸し、妊娠最終月に腹部温湿布として使用。温熱作用が子宮血流を改善し、胎盤位置調整と組織準備を促進。

items.title_en: Sea Cucumber Collagen Extraction for Joint Mobility Restoration
items.title_ja: ナマココラーゲン抽出による関節可動性回復法
items.desc_en: Dried sea cucumber slow-cooked with kelp, shiitake, and astragalus for sustained collagen and mucopolysaccharide extraction. Consumed three times weekly to rebuild cartilage matrix and restore flexibility in aging populations, particularly effective for manual laborers.
items.desc_ja: 乾燥ナマコをコンブ、シイタケ、オウギと長時間加熱。週3回摂取でコラーゲンとムコ多糖体を供給。加齢と労働者の関節柔軟性回復に特に有効。

items.title_en: Tegumi Hand Pressure Point Protocol for Grief-Related Blockage
items.title_ja: 悲しみ関連の気の滞りに対するテグミ手技療法
items.desc_en: Specific finger pressure techniques applied to meridian points on shoulders, chest, and abdomen to release emotional tension held after bereavement. Combined with verbal witness testimony, this somatic release work addresses grief-induced physical constriction and breathing restriction.
items.desc_ja: 喪失後の感情的緊張解放のための手指圧技。肩、胸部、腹部の経穴に特定の圧力を適用。言語的証言と組み合わせて悲しみ誘発の身体的収縮に対処。

items.title_en: Muchi Mugwort Rice Cake Seasonal Immune Fortification
items.title_ja: ヨモギ餅による季節的免疫強化儀式
items.desc_en: Glutinous rice cakes infused with fresh mugwort (yomogi), prepared at summer solstice and consumed weekly through July-August. Mugwort's volatile oils contain immune-stimulating compounds; timing aligns with peak insect-borne illness season in Okinawan climate.
items.desc_ja: 夏至に準備した新鮮ヨモギ入り糯米餅。7-8月に週1回摂取。ヨモギの精油は免疫刺激化合物含有。沖縄の虫媒介疾患ピーク季節に同期。

items.title_en: Deep Seawater Mineral Immersion for Wound Healing Acceleration
items.title_ja: 深海水ミネラル浸浴による創傷治癒加速法
items.desc_en: Water drawn from 600+ meter ocean depths, rich in trace minerals and magnesium, used for therapeutic soaking of cuts, ulcers, and surgical wounds. Mineral composition mimics fetal environment, triggering accelerated epithelialization and reduced infection rates through osmotic balancing.
items.desc_ja: 600m以上の深海から採取したミネラル豊富な水を創傷浸浴に使用。胎児環境に類似した成分が上皮化加速と感染率低下をもたらす。

items.title_en: Yuta Ancestor Communication for Illness Attribution and Resolution
items.title_ja: ユタによる祖先との通信による疾病帰属と解決
items.desc_en: Ritual consultation with female spiritual medium (yuta) to identify whether illness originates from ancestor neglect, unresolved family trauma, or spiritual imbalance. Diagnosis guides specific offerings, memorial practices, and sometimes combined herbal treatment protocols addressing root cause.
items.desc_ja: 女性霊媒（ユタ）による儀式的相談。疾病が祖先ネグレクト、未解決の家族トラウマ、または精神的不均衡に由来するかを特定。診断は供え物、追悼儀式、草本療法の導き。

items.title_en: Handama Leaf Fermentation for Digestive Restoration
items.title_ja: ハンダマ葉の発酵法による消化機能回復
items.desc_en: Purple spinach leaves undergo controlled fermentation in earthenware vessels to enhance probiotic content, treating chronic digestive weakness and post-illness malnutrition in Okinawan households. The fermentation process requires specific humidity and temperature monitoring.
items.desc_ja: 紫色のほうれん草葉を陶製の甕で管理発酵させ、プロバイオティクス含有量を高め、慢性消化不全と罹病後の栄養不良を治療する。

items.title_en: Nigana Bitter Herb Throat Gargle for Voice Preservation
items.title_ja: ニガナ苦草による喉ガラガラうがい声帯保護法
items.desc_en: Bitter herb decoctions used by singers, storytellers, and priestesses as daily throat maintenance, preventing vocal strain and inflammation. Preparation involves precise timing of harvest and specific water temperature for optimal bitter compound extraction without destroying beneficial properties.
items.desc_ja: 歌手、語り部、神女による日常的喉ケア用の苦草煎じ。声帯疲労と炎症予防。収穫時期と水温の厳密な調整が必須。

items.title_en: Sea Cucumber Viscera Wound Healing Poultice
items.title_ja: ナマコ内臓創傷治療湿布法
items.desc_en: Dried sea cucumber viscera combined with seaweed ash creates antimicrobial poultice applied to lacerations and surgical wounds. The enzyme-rich preparation accelerates tissue regeneration while preventing infection in tropical climate conditions.
items.desc_ja: 乾燥ナマコ内臓と海草灰を配合した抗菌性湿布。亜熱帯気候下での創傷治癒促進と感染予防。

items.title_ja: 産後骨出汁食療法（ウイガン）段階別配置
items.desc_en: Traditional sequenced broth progression from pork bone, chicken, and fish across forty days postpartum, each phase matching uterine involution stages. The san-ba midwife adjusts broths based on maternal recovery signs and bleeding patterns to restore strength.
items.desc_ja: 産後四十日間の段階的骨出汁療法。豚・鶏・魚の出汁を子宮復古過程に合わせ、産婆が出血パターンと回復徴候で調整。

items.title_en: Habu Bite Stone Suction Remedy and Herbal Binding
items.title_ja: ハブ咬傷石吸出療法とヨモギ結紮法
items.desc_en: Multi-stage habu venom extraction using smooth river stones heated and applied rhythmically to bite sites, followed by mugwort and bitter herb poultices secured with coconut fiber wrapping. Traditional tourniquets above the bite prevent systemic venom dispersal.
items.desc_ja: 川石加熱吸出と段階的ヨモギ・ニガナ結紮、ココヤシ繊維で固定。咬傷部位上の伝統的止血帯で全身毒性拡散防止。

items.title_en: Sakuna (命草) Root Decoction for Chronic Joint Inflammation
items.title_ja: サクナ根煎じによる慢性関節炎療法
items.desc_en: Long pepper plant roots harvested at specific lunar phases and slow-decocted for joint pain management in elderly populations. The preparation requires three-month aging in ceramic jars to develop anti-inflammatory alkaloids without degrading heat-sensitive compounds.
items.desc_ja: 特定陰暦時期採取サクナ根の低温煎じ。高齢者関節痛管理。陶製甕での三ヶ月熟成で抗炎症アルカロイド発達。

items.title_en: Ancestor-Grief Consultation Protocol with Yuta Priestesses
items.title_ja: 祖先悲嘆相談儀式ユタ神女プロトコル
items.desc_en: Structured grief counseling through yuta mediumship addressing unresolved ancestor-related distress and spiritual debt. Sessions involve ritual purification, ancestral acknowledgment, and prescribed family obligation adjustments to restore psychological equilibrium and communal harmony.
items.desc_ja: ユタ仲介による祖先関連悲嘆と精神債務カウンセリング。儀式的浄化、祖先認識、家族義務調整で心理的均衡と共同体調和を回復。

items.title_en: Typhoon Season Heat-Illness Prevention Muchi Rice Cake Protocol
items.title_ja: 台風季節熱中症予防ムチ米餅儀式食
items.desc_en: Ritual muchi rice cakes infused with cooling herbs (mint, mugwort, ginger) prepared communally before typhoon season to fortify heat tolerance and prevent summer heat illness. Distribution follows kinship networks ensuring vulnerable populations receive protective food.
items.desc_ja: 冷却効果ハーブ入りムチを台風季前に共同調理。熱耐性強化と熱中症予防。親族ネットワークで脆弱層への配布を確保。

items.title_en: Tegumi Manual Therapy for Childbirth-Related Sacral Misalignment
items.title_ja: テグミ手技療法による出産後仙骨変位矯正
items.desc_en: Okinawan hand-pressure techniques targeting postpartum sacral and pelvic realignment, preventing chronic lower back dysfunction and improving recovery quality. Practitioners train through apprenticeship observing hand pressure depth, angle, and rhythmic application across anatomical landmarks.
items.desc_ja: 産後仙骨・骨盤矯正手圧技法。慢性腰痛予防と回復質向上。修行生は手圧深度、角度、解剖学的ランドマーク対応リズムを観察習得。

items.title_en: Deep Seawater Mineral Therapy for Chronic Fatigue Recovery
items.title_ja: 深層海水ミネラル療法による慢性疲労回復
items.desc_en: Unfiltered deep seawater collected below thermocline layers provides mineral-rich therapy for chronic fatigue, supporting longevity practices. Ingestion protocols require specific timing relative to lunar cycles and individual constitutional assessment for optimal mineral absorption.
items.desc_ja: 水温躍層下の深層海水採取によるミネラル豊富療法。慢性疲労回復と長寿支援。陰暦サイクルと体質評価に合わせた摂取プロトコル。

items.title_en: Handama Leaf Paste for Wound Healing and Skin Conditions
items.title_ja: ハンダマ葉ペーストによる創傷治癒と皮膚疾患治療
items.desc_en: Handama (water spinach) leaves are crushed into poultice and applied directly to cuts, burns, and chronic skin conditions. The paste reduces inflammation, prevents infection, and accelerates tissue regeneration. Traditionally stored in sealed clay vessels for extended shelf life and potency preserva
items.desc_ja: ハンダマの葉を潰してペースト状にし、切り傷や火傷、慢性皮膚疾患に直接塗布する。炎症を軽減し感染を防ぎ、組織再生を促進する療法。密閉した陶製容器に保存して効力を維持する。

items.title_en: Nigana Bitter Herb Liver Detoxification Protocol
items.title_ja: ニガナ苦味草による肝臓解毒プロトコール
items.desc_en: Nigana (bitter herb) prepared as concentrated decoction consumed during spring to cleanse liver and improve bile flow. Dosage increases gradually over two weeks. Used preventatively after winter diet of preserved foods and to address seasonal fatigue and digestive sluggishness.
items.desc_ja: ニガナを濃厚な煎じ液にして春に肝臓浄化に用いる。2週間で段階的に用量を増やす。冬の保存食後の予防や季節疲労に対処する伝統的解毒療法。

items.title_en: Sakuna Long Pepper Stamina Elixir for Labor and Recovery
items.title_ja: サクナ長コショウによる労働と回復の活力エリキシル
items.desc_en: Sakuna (命草 - life plant) root fermented in awamori spirits for three months creates warming elixir consumed by laborers and postpartum mothers. Enhances endurance, restores blood, and prevents postpartum hemorrhage. Small daily doses maintain vitality during physically demanding seasons.
items.desc_ja: サクナの根をアワモリで3ヶ月発酵させた活力液。労働者と産後の女性が摂取。耐久力を高め、血液を回復させ、産後出血を予防する。季節労働時の活力維持に用いられる。

items.title_en: Habu Snake Bite Stone Remedy: Immediate Extraction Technique
items.title_ja: ハブ蛇咬傷石療法：直接抽出技術
items.desc_en: Specially prepared porous stones, heated and applied to habu bite punctures to draw out venom through capillary action. Stone selection and heating duration critical—underheating fails extraction, overheating causes tissue damage. Paired with herbal tourniquets using mugwort wrapping.
items.desc_ja: 多孔質石を加熱してハブの咬傷に当て、毛細管作用で毒液を吸収させる。石の選定と加熱時間が重要。蓬を使った止血帯と組み合わせて用いる応急処置法。

items.title_en: Sanba Traditional Midwifery: Abdominal Massage and Positioning
items.title_ja: 産婆伝統助産：腹部マッサージと体位変換
items.desc_en: Certified sanba (traditional midwives) perform specific abdominal massage sequences to facilitate labor progression and correct fetal positioning. Hand pressure rhythms synchronized with breathing patterns. Postpartum massage prevents retained placenta and aids uterine involution restoration.
items.desc_ja: 産婆による特定の腹部マッサージで陣痛進行と胎児位置を調整する。呼吸パターンと同期した手圧リズム。産後マッサージで胎盤停滞を防ぎ、子宮復古を促進する。

items.title_en: Deep Seawater Mineral Therapy for Joint and Bone Disorders
items.title_ja: 深海水ミネラル療法による関節と骨疾患治療
items.desc_en: Water drawn from 600+ meters depth rich in magnesium and calcium used as therapeutic bath and oral supplementation for arthritis, osteoporosis prevention, and bone fracture recovery. Seasonal collection preserves mineral balance; consumption timing aligned with lunar cycles for enhanced absorption.
items.desc_ja: 600メートル以上の深さから採取した水を関節炎や骨粗鬆症予防、骨折回復に用いる。季節採取でミネラルバランスを保持。旧暦に合わせた摂取で吸収を促進する。

items.title_en: Yuta Ancestor Consultation for Grief-Related Illness Resolution
items.title_ja: ユタによる祖先相談：悲嘆関連疾患の解決
items.desc_en: Yuta (female shamans) diagnose illness caused by ancestor distress or unresolved grief through trance communication. Prescribed remedies include specific offerings, memorial prayers, and family reconciliation ceremonies. Psychological healing occurs through identified unmet ancestral obligations.
items.desc_ja: ユタが祖先の不安や未解決の悲嘆による疾患を診断する。特定の供物、追悼祈祷、家族和解儀式を処方。祖先の未充足の義務を明確にして心理的治癒を促進する。

items.title_en: Tegumi Okinawan Hand Techniques for Spinal Alignment
items.title_ja: 手組みを使った脊椎配置技術
items.desc_en: Tegumi practitioners apply precise hand pressure sequences to realign vertebrae and release muscle tension. Technique involves diagnostic palpation to identify subluxation, followed by controlled pressure application at specific angles. Recovery protocol includes postural exercises and dietary suppo
items.desc_ja: 手圧による脊椎配置と筋肉弛緩技術。触診で亜脱臼を特定し、特定角度からの圧力を加える。回復プロトコールに姿勢運動と食事支援を含む。

items.title_en: Muchi Rice Cake Seasonal Protective Foods and Timing
items.title_ja: ムチ米餅による季節保護食と摂取タイミング
items.desc_en: Muchi (ritual rice cakes) prepared with specific ingredients for seasonal health protection. Summer versions include cooling herbs; winter versions contain warming spices. Distribution timing follows agricultural and ceremonial calendars, believed to prevent seasonal illnesses and maintain community
items.desc_ja: 季節ごとに異なる材料で作られたムチ。夏は冷却ハーブ、冬は温暖スパイスを含む。農業と儀式暦に従って配布され、季節疾患を予防し、健康平衡を保つ。

items.title_en: Sea Cucumber Immune Enhancement and Longevity Preparation
items.title_ja: 海参による免疫強化と長寿準備
items.desc_en: Dried sea cucumber slow-cooked in bone broth for 24 hours creates nutrient-dense tonic consumed during seasonal transitions and before high-stress periods. Collagen and mineral content supports joint flexibility and immune resilience. Preparation requires specific water temperature and cooking vesse
items.desc_ja: 干した海参を24時間かけて骨スープで煮込む。季節交替や高ストレス前に摂取。コラーゲンとミネラルで関節柔軟性と免疫力を強化する。調理容器の素材が重要。

items.title_en: Handama Leaf Paste for Wound Healing
items.title_ja: ハンダマ葉ペーストの傷治療法
items.desc_en: Purple sweet potato leaf (handama) crushed into paste with sea salt and applied directly to cuts, burns, and skin infections. The anthocyanin-rich leaves promote rapid tissue regeneration and prevent infection through antimicrobial properties valued in coastal communities.
items.desc_ja: ハンダマの紫色の葉を塩漬けにしてペースト状にし、切り傷やヤケドに直接塗布。抗菌作用と組織再生促進で感染予防に効果的。

items.title_ja: 臍帯炭焼き乾燥儀式
items.desc_en: Traditional midwife (sanba) practice of preserving newborn's umbilical cord by wrapping in cotton cloth and sun-drying over warm charcoal. The preserved cord (heso-o) stored in family altar as protective amulet preventing childhood illness.
items.desc_ja: 産婆が新生児の臍帯を木炭の温熱で乾燥させ、綿布に包んで保管。家族祭壇に保存し、子どもの病気予防の守り札として機能。

items.title_ja: ウミヘビ毒抗体油製造法
items.desc_en: Specialized preparation using sea snake skin, herbs (nigana, moogwaa), and sesame oil to create protective liniment. Fishermen apply pre-emptively and as emergency treatment for habu or sea snake envenomation, based on sympathetic magic principles.
items.desc_ja: ウミヘビの皮と苦い野草を麻油に漬け込んだ解毒油。漁民が予防的に塗布し、ハブ咬傷時の応急処置に使用。交感魔術の原理に基づく。

items.title_ja: 産後温め汁（アブタガニ汁）
items.desc_en: Hermit crab broth combined with ginger, angelica root, and red dates consumed daily for 30 days postpartum. Restores blood vitality, warms uterus, and prevents postpartum wind illness (fuusho) through warming, tonic principles in Okinawan gynecology.
items.desc_ja: ヤドカリ出汁にショウガ、トウキ、ナツメを加えた産後30日間の温め汁。血液活力回復と子宮温暖化で、産後風邪症予防。

items.title_ja: 喪の断食による先祖交信療法
items.desc_en: Yuta-guided practice where grieving individuals fast partially while meditating on deceased relatives' presence. Believed to open spiritual channels for emotional resolution. Combined with herbal bitter tea to heighten spiritual sensitivity and process ancestral-related psychological distress.
items.desc_ja: ユタの指導下で部分的断食と先祖想念により精神交信。苦い草茶で霊的感受性を高め、祖霊関連の心理的苦痛を解放。

items.title_ja: 台風対策根菜備蓄療法
items.desc_en: Traditional storage of bitter melon seeds, taro, and purple sweet potato in sealed earthen vessels pre-typhoon season. These foods prevent nutritional deficiency during prolonged isolation, stabilize blood sugar during stress, and maintain immune function against post-storm infections.
items.desc_ja: 台風前にゴーヤ種子、タロイモ、ハンダマを密閉容器に備蓄。栄養不足防止、ストレス血糖安定化、感染症予防に機能。

items.title_en: Goat Bone Marrow Extraction for Stamina
items.title_ja: ヤギ骨髄抽出スタミナ療法
items.desc_en: Slow-cooked goat bone broth consumed by laborers, fishermen, and elderly to restore vital essence (ki). The marrow fat and collagen provide nutritional density while traditional heating methods preserve enzymatic activity, central to Okinawan longevity diet practice.
items.desc_ja: 労働者や漁民が摂取する山羊骨髄スープ。コラーゲンと骨髄脂肪で気力回復。加熱方法で酵素活性を保持し、長寿食の中心。

items.title_ja: テグミ関節可動化技法
items.desc_en: Specialized hand technique (tegumi) combining rhythmic palm pressure, finger joint manipulation, and pressure point activation for arthritis, shoulder tension, and age-related stiffness. Practitioners develop sensitivity through years of apprenticeship to elderly masters.
items.desc_ja: 掌圧と指関節操作、経穴刺激を組み合わせた手技。関節炎と加齢による硬直に効果。職人的修行で感覚を磨く。

items.title_ja: 深層海水ミネラル浸浴療法
items.desc_en: Immersion in collected deep ocean water (200+ meters depth) rich in trace minerals, magnesium, and calcium. Used for rheumatism, skin conditions, and circulation improvement. Seasonal collection requires specialized knowledge of currents and mineral composition seasonal variation.
items.desc_ja: 200m以上の深層海水への浸浴。マグネシウムとカルシウムで関節炎と循環改善。季節による成分変化を熟知した採集技術。

items.title_en: Heat Illness Prevention Through Bitter Herb Rotation
items.title_ja: 苦草ローテーション熱中症予防法
items.desc_en: Systematic consumption of rotating bitter herbs (nigana, moogwaa, sakuna) throughout summer months to acclimatize body to heat stress and prevent heat stroke. Practitioners adjust herb selection based on individual constitution and humidity levels, embedded in agricultural labor customs.
items.desc_ja: 夏季の苦草ローテーション摂取で熱ストレス適応と熱射病予防。個人体質と湿度で調整。農業労働者の伝統慣行に組み込まれる。

items.title_en: Shisa Guardian Lion-Dogs: Placement and Protective Function
items.title_ja: シーサー：配置と守護機能
items.desc_en: Guardian figures placed on rooftops and gates. Originally Chinese lion figures adapted through Ryukyuan aesthetic. Placed in pairs (open-mouthed to invite good fortune, closed-mouthed to keep it). Specific placement rules govern orientation relative to roads, wind direction, and spiritual threats. E
items.desc_ja: 屋根や門に配置される守護像。中国獅子が琉球で独自に変容。開口（幸運招来）と閉口（幸運保持）の対で配置。道路・風向・霊的脅威に対する配置規則がある。各集落に村シーサーも存在。

items.title_en: Hinpun Screen Walls: Spiritual and Wind Protection
items.title_ja: ヒンプン：霊的・防風の遮蔽壁
items.desc_en: Freestanding stone or coral walls placed at house entrances to block direct entry of evil spirits (which travel in straight lines) and typhoon winds. The width and height follow feng shui principles. Named after the screen walls in Shuri Castle. Combines Chinese geomantic knowledge with local typhoo
items.desc_ja: 家の入口に設置する独立した石壁。直線的に移動する悪霊と台風の風を遮る。幅・高さは風水原理に従う。首里城の屏風壁に由来。中国風水学と地元の台風適応の融合。

items.title_en: Fukugi Windbreak Groves: Living Typhoon Defense
items.title_ja: 福木防風林：生きた台風防御
items.desc_en: Dense plantings of Garcinia subelliptica trees surrounding traditional village houses. The evergreen trees with interlocking branches create a natural windbreak against typhoons. Also provide golden dye for textiles. Village-level fukugi management represents communal environmental knowledge integra
items.desc_ja: 伝統的家屋を囲む福木（ガルシニア）の密植。常緑の枝が絡み合い台風への天然防風壁を形成。織物用の金色染料も供給。集落レベルの福木管理は環境知識と工芸生産の統合。

items.title_en: Kamekobaka: Turtle-back Tomb Architecture and Feng Shui Siting
items.title_ja: 亀甲墓：亀甲型墓と風水的立地
items.desc_en: Distinctive Okinawan tomb shaped like a turtle's shell (symbol of longevity), built into hillsides facing the sea. The interior is designed to hold multiple generations of a munchuu lineage. Feng shui principles govern site selection: facing south toward water, backed by mountains, protected from no
items.desc_ja: 亀の甲羅（長寿の象徴）を模した沖縄独特の墓。海に面した丘陵に構築。門中数世代の納骨に対応する内部構造。南面・背後に山・北風回避の風水原理で立地を決定。

items.title_en: Shisa Pair Placement and Evil Spirit Deflection
items.title_ja: シーサーの配置と悪霊除け
items.desc_en: Twin lion-dog guardians placed at gateways and rooftops to deflect malevolent spirits. The open-mouthed male faces outward while the closed-mouthed female faces inward, creating protective spiritual balance and harmony.
items.desc_ja: 門や屋根に配置されるシーサーペアは悪霊を払う。開いた口の雄は外向き、閉じた口の雌は内向きで、精神的なバランスと調和を作る。

items.title_en: Hinpun Screen Wall Energy Flow Direction
items.title_ja: ヒンプン画面壁のエネルギー流れ
items.desc_en: Decorative fence walls positioned between gates and houses redirect chi flow, preventing negative energy from entering directly. Their curved or angled placement at precise angles optimizes spiritual protection and property harmony.
items.desc_ja: 門と家の間に配置された装飾的な塀壁は気の流れを改善する。曲線や角度を持つ配置により、負のエネルギーを防ぎ、精神的な保護と調和を最適化する。

items.title_ja: フクギ樹垣の風除けの祝福
items.desc_en: Dense evergreen fukugi hedges planted around properties serve dual purposes: physical windbreak protection and spiritual boundary marking. Their robust growth symbolizes family prosperity, longevity, and accumulated ancestral blessings over generations.
items.desc_ja: フクギの濃い常緑樹垣は物理的な防風と精神的な境界を示す。堅牢な成長は家族の繁栄、長寿、世代を超えた祖先の祝福を象徴する。

items.title_ja: カメコバカ亀甲墓の祖先配置
items.desc_en: Turtle-shaped family tombs oriented toward specific cardinal directions to maintain ancestral connection and spiritual continuity. Proper alignment ensures ancestor spirits remain protective guardians, blessing descendants and maintaining household fortune stability.
items.desc_ja: カメ型の家族墓は特定の方向に向けられ、祖先との繋がりと精神的な継続性を保つ。適切な配置により、祖先の精霊は保護者として機能し、子孫に祝福を与える。

items.title_en: Ishiganto Stone Gate Portal Spiritual Threshold
items.title_ja: 石ガントー石製門霊的閾値
items.desc_en: Stone gate structures marking sacred boundaries between living and spiritual realms. Their precise construction height and orientation channels beneficial cosmic forces inward while filtering harmful influences, establishing protective thresholds for community sanctuaries.
items.desc_ja: 聖地の境界を示す石製門構造は、有益な宇宙力を内側に導き、有害な影響を濾過する。精密な構造と向きは、地域の聖域の保護閾値を確立する。

items.title_ja: 村落配置の地相学的経路
items.desc_en: Strategic arrangement of homes, shrines, and pathways following dragon lines and energy meridians. Village orientation respects natural landscape features, ensuring collective prosperity through harmonious chi distribution across entire community settlements.
items.desc_ja: 家屋、神社、経路の戦略的な配置は龍脈とエネルギーの経線に従う。村落の向きは自然景観を尊重し、全体的なコミュニティ繁栄を確保する。

items.title_en: Shisa Eye Direction and Visual Spirit Surveillance
items.title_ja: シーサーの目の方向と精神的監視
items.desc_en: Shisa eye orientation determines surveillance patterns of spiritual realms. Paired gazes create comprehensive protective coverage, with eyes positioned to observe both visible and invisible threats, maintaining constant vigilance over household sanctity.
items.desc_ja: シーサーの目の向きは精神界の監視パターンを決定する。対をなす視線は包括的な保護範囲を作り、目に見えない脅威を観察し、家庭の聖性を維持する。

items.title_ja: ヒンプン装飾パターンの象徴的祝福
items.desc_en: Intricate patterns carved or painted on hinpun screens encode protective blessings and prosperity symbols. Geometric designs and traditional motifs actively channel auspicious forces, transforming decorative elements into functional spiritual conduits.
items.desc_ja: ヒンプンに彫られた複雑なパターンは保護的な祝福と繁栄のシンボルをエンコードする。幾何学的なデザインと伝統的なモチーフは幸運の力を導き、装飾要素を精神的な導管に変える。

items.title_en: Fukugi Root System Ancestral Connection Deepening
items.title_ja: フクギの根系統と祖先繋がりの深化
items.desc_en: Fukugi tree deep root systems symbolize ancestral grounding and spiritual stability. As hedges mature over decades, their expanding roots metaphorically anchor family lineages to ancestral lands, strengthening intergenerational spiritual bonds and inherited protection.
items.desc_ja: フクギの深い根系統は祖先の根付きと精神的な安定を象徴する。垣根が数十年成熟するにつれ、根は家系を祖先の土地に錨付けし、世代を超えた精神的結合を強化する。

items.title_en: Kamekobaka Tomb Interior Spirit Chamber Preparation
items.title_ja: カメコバカ墓内部の精神室準備
items.desc_en: Interior chamber arrangements within kamekobaka tombs facilitate ancestral spirit comfort and continued family communication. Specific placement of ritual vessels, offerings, and inscriptions maintains spiritual pathways, enabling ongoing dialogue between living descendants and honored ancestors.
items.desc_ja: カメコバカ墓内部の室配置は祖先精霊の快適さと家族の継続的なコミュニケーションを促進する。儀式用容器、供物、銘文の配置は精神的経路を維持し、世代間の対話を可能にする。

items.title_ja: シーサーの門配置
items.desc_en: Strategic positioning of guardian lion statues at entrances to deflect negative spiritual forces. Paired male-female shisa protect homes through directional alignment with cosmic energy flows and architectural openings.
items.desc_ja: 家の入口に配置されるシーサーの守護獅子像。悪霊を払い、宇宙エネルギーと建築の開口部との方向性に基づいて家を守る。

items.title_ja: ひんぷん屏風の向き
items.desc_en: Decorative semicircular walls positioned behind doorways to block direct spiritual entry. Orientation determines chi flow patterns, with curved surfaces reflecting harmful energy while maintaining household harmony and privacy boundaries.
items.desc_ja: 戸口の背後に配置される半円形の屏風壁。曲線が邪気を反射し、家の調和とプライバシー境界を保つ。

items.title_ja: フクギ防風林の幾何学
items.desc_en: Dense hedge arrangement of fukugi trees protecting villages from typhoons while creating energetic boundaries. Row spacing and height follow feng shui principles balancing wind resistance with chi circulation through community settlements.
items.desc_ja: フクギの密集した生け垣は集落を台風から保護する。列間隔と高さは気の循環とバランスを取るために配置される。

items.title_ja: カメコバカ墓の配置原則
items.desc_en: Turtle-shaped burial structures positioned according to topographic features and ancestor veneration principles. Orientation toward cardinal directions and protective hills ensures spiritual continuity between living communities and ancestral realms.
items.desc_ja: 亀型の埋葬構造は地形や祖先崇拝の原則に従い配置される。方位と保護的な丘への向きは精神的継続性を確保する。

items.title_ja: 石がんと石門の気チャネリング
items.desc_en: Rectangular stone gateways marking village boundaries and energetic thresholds. Portal geometry channels protective spiritual force inward while preventing negative influences from entering community spaces.
items.desc_ja: 石造りの門は集落の境界と気的な分岐点を示す。門のデザインは保護的な霊力を内側に導く。

items.title_ja: 集落放射状街路の気エネルギー
items.desc_en: Hub-and-spoke street patterns radiating from central gathering spaces distribute chi evenly throughout settlements. Geometric arrangement prevents energy stagnation while promoting community cohesion and spiritual harmony.
items.desc_ja: 中央広場から放射状に広がる街路は気を均等に配分する。この幾何学的配置は集落全体の精神的調和を促進する。

items.title_ja: シーサー眼開き儀式
items.desc_en: Ceremonial activation of newly crafted shisa statues through eye-painting rituals. Priests invoke protective spirits into guardian lions, establishing energetic connection between sculptures and household inhabitants throughout blessing ceremonies.
items.desc_ja: 新しく作られたシーサーの目を描く儀式による活性化。司祭が守護霊を呼び出し、石像と家族をつなぐ。

items.title_ja: ひんぷん装飾パターン象徴
items.desc_en: Symbolic patterns carved into hinpun screens representing prosperity, longevity, and protection. Each motif carries specific energetic properties, with traditional designs amplifying beneficial chi while restricting malevolent spiritual flow.
items.desc_ja: ひんぷんに彫られた装飾パターンは繁栄と長寿を象徴する。各文様は特定の気的性質を持つ。

items.title_ja: フクギ植樹の季節的タイミング
items.desc_en: Agricultural and spiritual calendar alignment for fukugi tree planting affecting protective barrier effectiveness. Seasonal timing ensures optimal growth while harmonizing living windbreak energy with annual cosmic cycles and community renewal periods.
items.desc_ja: フクギ植樹の季節的タイミングは保護作用に影響する。季節に合わせた植樹は気のエネルギーを最適化する。

items.title_ja: カメコバカ祖先系統の向き
items.desc_en: Tomb orientation determining spiritual connection between deceased ancestors and living lineages. Directional alignment follows family genealogy and landscape features, ensuring ancestral blessings flow into household prosperity.
items.desc_ja: 墓の向きは死者と家族の精神的つながりを決定する。方角は系統と地形に基づき配置される。

items.title_en: Shisa Placement Direction and Evil Eye Deflection
items.title_ja: シーサー配置と邪眼払い
items.desc_en: Strategic positioning of Shisa lion-dogs at gates and rooflines to deflect negative spiritual energy and malevolent gazes. Direction, height, and paired positioning determine protective efficacy and household harmony enhancement.
items.desc_ja: 門や屋根にシーサーを配置し、負のエネルギーと邪眼を払う方法。方角、高さ、対の配置で効果が決まり、家運向上をもたらす。

items.title_en: Hinpun Screen Energy Flow and Chi Channeling
items.title_ja: ヒンプン気流と気の流れ
items.desc_en: Decorative fence-screens positioned to redirect chi energy flows through residential spaces. Curved designs and material selection influence spiritual circulation, preventing stagnation and promoting household vitality and prosperity.
items.desc_ja: 住宅空間を通る気の流れをヒンプンで誘導する技法。曲線設計と素材選定で気の循環を促進し、滞留を防ぎ家の活力を高める。

items.title_ja: フクギの風除け戦略配置
items.desc_en: Indigenous Fukugi tree placement as living windbreaks and property boundaries according to directional principles. Tree height, spacing, and orientation create protective barriers while channeling beneficial winds and regulating microclimate conditions.
items.desc_ja: フクギ樹を方角原理に従い防風林として配置する知識。樹高、間隔、向きで保護柵を形成し、良い風を導き微気候を調整する。

items.title_en: Kamekobaka Tomb Orientation and Ancestral Connection
items.title_ja: 亀甲墓の方角と先祖結縁
items.desc_en: Turtle-shell shaped tomb positioning oriented toward auspicious directions to strengthen ancestor veneration and familial spiritual bonds. Entrance direction, surrounding landscape, and proximity to dwelling influence descendant prosperity and protection.
items.desc_ja: 亀甲墓を吉方に向け先祖とのつながりを深める配置法。入口方角、周辺地形、住まいとの距離で子孫の繁栄と守護が決まる。

items.title_en: Ishiganto Stone Gate Spiritual Boundary Demarcation
items.title_ja: 石樋の霊的境界設定
items.desc_en: Stone gateway structures marking spiritual and physical boundaries between sacred and secular spaces. Monumental stone construction, inscriptions, and placement establish protected zones, channeling benevolent energy while restricting malevolent intrusion.
items.desc_ja: 石造の門で聖俗空間の霊的境界を示す。石の大きさ、銘文、配置で守られた領域を形成し、良い気を導き悪い力を制限する。

items.title_en: Village Layout Cardinal Direction Alignment Principles
items.title_ja: 村落配置と四方位整列原理
items.desc_en: Systematic arrangement of village structures according to cardinal and intercardinal directions creating harmonious chi distribution. Street orientation, building placement, and central gathering spaces establish protective energy fields and communal spiritual coherence.
items.desc_ja: 村の建物を四方位と間方位に配置し気を調和させる原理。街路方角、建物位置、中心広場で守護エネルギーと共同霊性を形成。

items.title_en: Shisa Eye Gaze Direction and Protective Vision Activation
items.title_ja: シーサーの視線方角と守護眼の発動
items.desc_en: Precise eye direction of Shisa figures determines protective vision range and spiritual vigilance activation. Opposing pairs with outward-inward gazes create comprehensive surveillance fields, neutralizing threats from all directional angles simultaneously.
items.desc_ja: シーサーの眼の向き方で守護視線の範囲が決まる。対になった内向き外向きの視線で全方向の脅威を同時に中和する。

items.title_en: Hinpun Curve Design and Negative Energy Deflection Geometry
items.title_ja: ヒンプン曲線設計と負のエネルギー払い幾何学
items.desc_en: Curved architectural geometry of hinpun screens mathematically designed to deflect straight-line negative spiritual forces. Spiral and wave patterns embedded in decoration redirect malevolent chi away from interior spaces and inhabitants.
items.desc_ja: ヒンプンの曲線幾何学で直線的な負のエネルギーを払う。螺旋と波紋文様が装飾に組み込まれ悪い気を内部から遠ざける。

items.title_en: Fukugi Planting Density and Seasonal Energy Adjustment
items.title_ja: フクギ植栽密度と季節的エネルギー調整
items.desc_en: Controlled planting density of Fukugi trees adjusts property energy intensity across seasonal cycles. Denser configurations during vulnerable seasons provide stronger protection, while sparser arrangements allow beneficial seasonal energy penetration.
items.desc_ja: フクギの植栽密度を季節ごとに調整してエネルギー強度を変える。脆弱な季節は密植で守り、良い季節は疎植で気を通す。

items.title_en: Kamekobaka Entrance Portal Ritual and Ancestral Activation Ceremony
items.title_ja: 亀甲墓入口儀礼と先祖啓発式
items.desc_en: Ceremonial entrance procedures and ritual words activate ancestral spiritual presence within tombs. Timing aligned with lunar calendar and family occasions, specific hand gestures and offerings channel communication channels between living descendants and revered ancestors.
items.desc_ja: 墓の入口で行う儀式と言葉で先祖の霊を起動させる。陰暦と家族行事に合わせた時間、手振りと供え物で子孫と先祖を通じさせる。

items.title_ja: 壺屋シーサー手捏ね技法
items.desc_en: The distinctive Tsuboya pottery district's method of hand-sculpting shisa guardian lions, emphasizing facial expression asymmetry and clay body proportioning. Knowledge includes clay sourcing from local riverbeds, firing temperature control in traditional kilns, and regional stylistic markers recogn
items.desc_ja: 壺屋焼の職人による手作りシーサー製作。顔の非対称性と身体バランスの調整、地元河床の粘土選別、焼成温度管理が含まれる。

items.title_ja: グスク石積み乾積み工法
items.desc_en: Ancient fortification dry-stacking technique using precisely hand-cut coral limestone blocks. Knowledge encompasses stone selection by density and weathering patterns, cutting angle calculations for load distribution, and interlocking placement preventing typhoon displacement while maintaining struc
items.desc_ja: グスク城の珊瑚石灰岩ブロック乾積み工法。密度評価、切断角度計算、台風耐性を持つ嵌め込み配置が伝承される。

items.title_ja: 一番座敷方位配置儀礼
items.desc_en: Sacred room placement knowledge determining household social hierarchy and spiritual alignment. Encompasses southeast positioning for prestige, specific distance ratios from entrance, relationship to tokonoma alcoves, and seasonal adjustment of seating arrangements reflecting family status and celes
items.desc_ja: 一番座敷の方位・距離・役割を定める知識。南東配置、玄関との距離比、床の間との関係、季節調整が含まれる。

items.title_ja: ガジュマル聖域設営知識
items.desc_en: Ritual knowledge for establishing spiritual sanctuary beneath ancient banyan trees, including root system identification, protective fence placement at prescribed distances, spirit-dwelling cavity recognition, and seasonal maintenance preventing tree stress while maintaining accessible ritual space
items.desc_ja: ガジュマル根元の聖域設営。根系判定、柵の設置距離、精霊住居の洞窟認識、季節管理が伝承される。

items.title_ja: ヒジャ共同井戸作法
items.desc_en: Complex water-usage hierarchy governing multi-family well access, including ceremonial first-draw timing, water quality assessment by taste and clarity, seasonal flow adjustment interpretation, and conflict resolution methods. Knowledge maintains community harmony and ensures equitable water distrib
items.desc_ja: 共同井戸の利用順序、初汲み儀式、水質評価、季節流量判定、紛争解決法。地域の水資源管理知識。

items.title_ja: 瓦葺き台風耐性配置法
items.desc_en: Specialized roof tile overlapping and fastening knowledge preventing wind uplift during typhoons. Encompasses tile weight distribution calculation, interlocking ridge pattern secrets, clay body composition for flexibility versus rigidity, and seasonal re-tensioning procedures maintaining structural
items.desc_ja: 赤瓦の重なり方、留め金装置、粘土配合、季節調整法。台風時の風圧耐性計算が含まれる。

items.title_ja: 識名園石組景観縮図法
items.desc_en: Knowledge of creating miniature landscape worlds through strategic stone placement reflecting mountain ranges, water systems, and spiritual geography. Encompasses viewing angle calculations for optimal perspective, seasonal color complementarity with vegetation, and stone shape-personality matching
