items.title_en: Mountain-Facing Burial Site Wind Protection Principles
items.title_ja: 墓所風水背山面水配置
items.desc_en: Geomantic knowledge for tomb placement utilizing mountain wind-breaks and water-feature proximity. Encompasses topographic reading for spirit circulation patterns, seasonal wind direction analysis, water drainage toward burial ground preventing moisture damage, and multi-generational family spatial
items.desc_ja: 墓所の背山面水配置。地形読み、季節風向分析、水流制御、一族配置調和が含まれた風水知識。

items.title_ja: 石畳み路面圧密工法
items.desc_en: Traditional pathway construction knowledge using layered sand and coral stone creating water-drainage systems. Encompasses stone size grading for foot comfort, compression timing preventing settlement, seasonal moisture adjustment, and aesthetic alignment creating visual flow connecting sacred and r
items.desc_ja: 砂層と珊瑚石による路面構造。石の段階分級、圧密タイミング、湿度調整、視覚的流線設計が含まれる。

items.title_en: Red-White Architectural Color Symbolism Spatial Application
items.title_ja: 赤白色彩象徴空間配置
items.desc_en: Knowledge of deploying red pigment for power-assertion in gate structures and white lime-wash for purity in sacred interior spaces. Encompasses pigment sourcing from local minerals, application timing relative to ceremonies, color saturation levels indicating status ranks, and directional symbolic a
items.desc_ja: 赤色による権力表現と白色による聖性表現の建築空間への配置。顔料調達、儀礼時期、濃淡と身分、方位象徴が含まれる。

items.title_ja: 壷屋シーサー顔面比例暗号
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of how Tsuboya potters encoded protective spiritual properties through precise facial ratios: eye-to-snout distances reflecting lunar cycles, nostril size indicating family lineage, jaw angles determining neighborhood protection range.
items.desc_ja: 壷屋焼き職人が顔面比率に守護霊力を暗号化する技法。目鼻間距離の月周期対応、鼻孔サイズの家系表示、顎角度の近所守護範囲決定。

items.title_en: Gusuku Limestone Grain Reading for Structural Placement
items.title_ja: グスク石灰岩木目読み構造配置
items.desc_en: Art of identifying grain patterns within cut coral limestone blocks to predict stress points and optimal placement. Masons read microscopic fossil alignments to determine load-bearing strength and typhoon resistance positioning.
items.desc_ja: 珊瑚石灰岩ブロック内の木目紋理から応力点を予測し最適配置する技法。化石微細配列から耐荷重性と台風耐性位置を判断。

items.title_en: Asagi Communal House Airflow Direction Mapping
items.title_ja: アサギ共有家屋気流方向地図
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge of how asagi open-sided structures channel northeast trade winds while creating thermal pockets for seasonal comfort. Columnar spacing, roof height ratios, and entrance positioning optimize air circulation patterns.
items.desc_ja: アサギ開放構造が北東貿易風を導き季節快適性の熱ポケット形成。柱間隔、屋根高さ比率、入口位置が気流パターン最適化。

items.title_en: Deigo Tree Flowering Prediction for Harvest Timing
items.title_ja: デイゴ開花予測収穫時期判定
items.desc_en: Elder knowledge correlating deigo tree blossom patterns with sugarcane maturity cycles and weather pattern shifts. Specific bloom coloration and petal drop sequences indicate optimal harvesting windows and approaching typhoon seasons.
items.desc_ja: デイゴ開花パターンと黒砂糖成熟周期の相関。特定開花色と花弁落下序列が最適収穫時期と台風季節接近を示唆。

items.title_en: Hija Well Water Salinity Layer Navigation
items.title_ja: ヒジャ井戸塩分層ナビゲーション
items.desc_en: Specialized technique for drawing water from community wells at precise depths avoiding saltwater intrusion layers. Rope length calculations, seasonal freshwater table fluctuation mapping, and sensory detection of brackish zones.
items.desc_ja: 共有井戸から正確な深度で塩水侵入層を避けて汲む技法。ロープ長計算、季節淡水層変動地図、塩辛味知覚検出。

items.title_en: Kawara Red Tile Overlap Mathematics for Storm Drainage
items.title_ja: 瓦赤瓦重複数学台風排水
items.desc_en: Quantified knowledge of tile overlap angles and spacing to direct typhoon rainfall away from walls. Specific measurements ensure water cascades from roof without pooling or wind-driven leakage during severe storms.
items.desc_ja: 瓦重複角度と間隔が台風降雨を壁から離す数学。特定測定が風駆動漏水なく雨水を屋根から流す。

items.title_en: Shikinaen Garden Symbolic Stone Placement Cosmology
items.title_ja: 識名園庭園象徴石配置宇宙論
items.desc_en: Royal garden design knowledge encoding celestial bodies and mythological narratives through stone positioning. Specific rock placements represent constellations, island formations, and cosmological principles governing harmony between human and natural realms.
items.desc_ja: 石配置が天体と神話を暗号化する王庭園設計知識。特定岩石配置は星座、島嶼形成、人間自然調和の宇宙原理表現。

items.title_en: Mountain-Facing Burial Orientation Spirit Wind Calculation
items.title_ja: 山向き埋葬方角精霊風計算
items.desc_en: Funerary site selection knowledge determining optimal mountain-facing angles for ancestral spirit ascension. Incorporates wind patterns, water proximity for spiritual purification, topographic contours influencing soul trajectory pathways.
items.desc_ja: 祖霊上昇最適山向き角度決定埋葬地選択知識。風パターン、精霊浄化水接近性、魂軌跡経路影響地形含む。

items.title_en: Ishidatami Path Stone Weathering Age Estimation
items.title_ja: 石畳道石風化年齢推定
items.desc_en: Knowledge of reading surface patination, lichen colonization patterns, and erosion profiles on ancient stone paths to determine walk-traffic intensity and path antiquity. Specific weathering signatures indicate ceremonial importance and historical foot-traffic density.
items.desc_ja: 古い石道の表面風化、地衣類植民パターン、侵食プロファイルから歩行強度と古さ判定。特定風化署名が儀式重要性示唆。

items.title_en: Architectural Color Symbolism Red-White Spatial Balance Theory
items.title_ja: 建築色彩象徴赤白空間バランス理論
items.desc_en: Ryukyuan spatial philosophy employing red and white color placement to establish protective-purifying equilibrium. Red accents mark power zones and spirit entry points; white surfaces reflect harmful influences. Ratio calculations determine household spiritual efficacy.
items.desc_ja: 赤白色配置で守護浄化均衡確立する琉球空間哲学。赤が権力帯と精霊入口標識、白が有害影響反射。比率計算が家庭精霊効力決定。

items.title_ja: 瓦焼き台風耐性配置技術
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of overlapping red tile arrangement patterns that distribute typhoon wind pressure evenly across Okinawan roofs. Techniques include alternating tile heights, strategic nail placement, and ridge reinforcement methods.
items.desc_ja: 沖縄の屋根に台風の風圧を均等に分散させる赤瓦の重ね合わせ配置パターン。タイルの高さ交互配置、戦略的な釘打ち、棟補強方法を含む。

items.title_en: Coral Limestone Quarry Selection and Cutting Grades
items.title_ja: サンゴ石灰岩採石地選定と切断等級
items.desc_en: Knowledge of identifying optimal coral limestone deposits by color, density, and salinity content. Includes grading systems for fortification walls, water permeability assessment, and seasonal quarrying timing.
items.desc_ja: 色、密度、塩分含有量による最適なサンゴ石灰岩鉱床の識別知識。要塞壁、透水性評価、季節採石タイミングの等級システムを含む。

items.title_en: Gajumaru Root Architecture and Sacred Boundary Demarcation
items.title_ja: ガジュマル根系建築と神聖境界標識
items.desc_en: Understanding how banyan tree root systems shape village spatial organization and demarcate sacred versus secular zones. Knowledge includes root-induced ground elevation, water table influence, and spiritual boundary reinforcement through planting.
items.desc_ja: ガジュマルの根系が村の空間組織を形成し、神聖区域と俗世区域を分ける知識。根による地盤隆起、水位影響、植栽による精神的境界補強を含む。

items.title_en: Hija Well Water Hierarchy and Seasonal Access Protocols
items.title_ja: 樋者井戸水階級と季節使用プロトコル
items.desc_en: Community well etiquette establishing water access hierarchy by social status, age, and gender. Seasonal variation in water quality, rotation schedules, ritual purification before drawing, and conflict resolution mechanisms.
items.desc_ja: 社会階級、年齢、性別による水アクセス階級を確立するコミュニティ井戸の礼儀。水質の季節変動、交替スケジュール、汲み上げ前の儀式的浄化、紛争解決メカニズム。

items.title_en: Deigo Tree Phenology and Agricultural Planting Calendars
items.title_ja: デイゴ樹木の季節表現と農業植栽暦
items.desc_en: Using deigo flower blooming patterns as phenological markers for planting schedule decisions. Knowledge includes flower color intensity variations predicting rainfall, pest activity cycles, and optimal planting windows.
items.desc_ja: デイゴの開花パターンを農作業スケジュール決定の季節表現指標として使用。花の色強度変動による降水量予測、害虫活動周期、最適な植栽ウィンドウを含む。

items.title_en: Asagi Communal House Acoustic and Thermal Zoning
items.title_ja: アサギ共有建造物の音響・熱帯地気候ゾーニング
items.desc_en: Spatial design of elevated open-sided communal houses optimizing airflow, sound projection for announcements, and thermal regulation. Knowledge includes pillar spacing for wind patterns, platform height for flood protection, and gathering capacity calculations.
items.desc_ja: 通風、公布アナウンスの音響投影、熱調整を最適化した高床式半開放共有建造物。柱間隔の風パターン、洪水保護のための台高さ、集会容量計算を含む。

items.title_en: Ishidatami Path Material Selection by Regional Geology
items.title_ja: 石畳道材料選択と地域地質学
items.desc_en: Regional stone type selection for traditional paved paths based on local geology, friction properties, water drainage, and durability. Knowledge includes Tsuboya volcanic stone, Yomitan limestone paths, and regional aesthetic preferences.
items.desc_ja: 地域地質学、摩擦特性、水排水、耐久性に基づく伝統的石畳道の地域石材選択。壺屋火山岩、読谷石灰岩小道、地域審美的嗜好を含む。

items.title_en: Nibanzashiki Room Orientation for Ancestral Shrine Placement
items.title_ja: 二番座敷の祖先神社配置方位学
items.desc_en: Secondary room orientation principles ensuring proper ancestral altar positioning relative to cardinal directions, window placement for spiritual light, and spatial separation from secular activities. Includes family lineage documentation through room arrangement.
items.desc_ja: 主要方角との関連で祖先祭壇配置を確保する二番座敷の方位原則。精神的光のための窓配置、俗世活動からの空間分離を含む。系譜文書化を部屋配置で行う。

items.title_en: White Lime Plaster Application Timing for Salt-Spray Protection
items.title_ja: 白石灰漆喰塗布タイミング塩分防止
items.desc_en: Seasonal application schedules for white lime plaster on exterior walls maximizing protection against sea salt spray and typhoon moisture. Knowledge includes preparation phases, curing time optimization, and reapplication intervals based on coastal proximity.
items.desc_ja: 海塩スプレーと台風湿気に対する保護を最大化する外壁への白石灰漆喰の季節塗布スケジュール。準備段階、硬化時間最適化、沿岸距離に基づく再塗布間隔を含む。

items.title_en: Red Shisa Pigment Sourcing and Application Ritual Significance
items.title_ja: 赤シーサー顔料供給源と儀式的意義
items.desc_en: Traditional red pigment extraction and application protocols for protective shisa statues, distinguishing regional styles (Tsuboya earthenware red, Yomitan cast iron red). Knowledge includes ceremonial application sequences and pigment renewal annual timing.
items.desc_ja: 保護シーサー像の赤顔料抽出と塗布プロトコル、地域スタイルの区別（壺屋焼赤、読谷鋳鉄赤）。儀式的塗布順序、顔料更新の年間タイミングを含む。

items.title_en: Deigo Tree Plantation for Windbreak Architecture
items.title_ja: デイゴ樹防風建築配置法
items.desc_en: Strategic planting of deigo trees in specific orientations to protect residential compounds from typhoon winds while marking seasonal blooming cycles. Knowledge includes optimal spacing, pruning techniques, and integration with stone walls for maximum wind deflection and aesthetic harmony.
items.desc_ja: 台風風対策のためデイゴを特定方向に植樹し、季節開花を利用した防風建築配置。間隔、剪定技術、石垣統合による風除去と美的調和の知識

items.title_en: Akagi Root Water Detection and Spring Sourcing
items.title_ja: アカギ根系水脈探知法
items.desc_en: Traditional method using akagi tree root patterns to locate underground water sources and determine spring quality. Practitioners identify deep water flows through root depth observation, enabling optimal placement of community wells and understanding seasonal water availability variations.
items.desc_ja: アカギ根系パターンから地下水脈位置を特定する技法。根深さから水流方向判定し、共有井戸配置と季節水量変動を理解する方法論

items.title_en: Coral Limestone Directional Cutting for Gusuku Walls
items.title_ja: 城塁用珊瑚石灰岩方向切断法
items.desc_en: Specialized technique for cutting coral limestone blocks according to grain direction and layering patterns, ensuring structural integrity and longevity. Knowledge includes identifying optimal cutting lines, water saturation timing, and tool selection for defensive castle wall construction.
items.desc_ja: 珊瑚石灰岩の層理方向に沿った切断技法。構造強度と耐久性確保の切断線判定、含水適正時期、防御城塁用工具選択の知識体系

items.title_en: Tsuboya District Shisa Facial Expression Diagnostic Art
items.title_ja: 壺屋シーサー表情診断造形術
items.desc_en: Artisanal knowledge of crafting shisa with region-specific facial expressions reflecting protective spiritual intentions. Tsuboya potters encode subtle eye angles, mouth positioning, and ear proportions to enhance supernatural detection capabilities and neighborhood spiritual effectiveness.
items.desc_ja: 地域別シーサー表情造形による防護霊力機能の違い。瞳角度、口位置、耳比率の微妙な違いが超自然検知能力を高める造形知識

items.title_en: Asagi Communal House Floor Level Hierarchy Principles
items.title_ja: アサギ共有家屋床高度階層原理
items.desc_en: Complex understanding of floor level variations within asagi structures indicating social rank, age cohorts, and ceremonial roles. Height differences of inches communicate family status, visitor classification, and ritual participation rights, creating invisible social architecture within physical s
items.desc_ja: アサギ内部床高度差による社会階層表現。インチ単位の高さ差が家族地位、来訪者分類、儀式参加権を空間的に表現する社会建築知識

items.title_en: Ishidatami Path Moisture and Slip Prevention Geometry
items.title_ja: 石畳道湿度滑止め幾何学配置
items.desc_en: Precise geometric arrangement of stone pavers in traditional pathways using angled surfaces and drainage grooves to prevent rainwater pooling and maintain traction in typhoon-prone climate. Knowledge includes seasonal stone replacement and erosion pattern prediction.
items.desc_ja: 雨水滞留防止と摩擦確保の石畳配置幾何学。排水溝、傾斜角度、季節交換時期と侵食パターン予測による台風気候対応技法

items.title_en: Yomitan Shisa Hand-Molding Spiritual Intention Transfer
items.title_ja: 読谷シーサー手捏造形霊的意図転移法
items.desc_en: Potters' knowledge of imprinting protective intentions through hand-molding techniques, where finger pressure patterns, clay rotation speed, and firing temperature variations encode spiritual energy. Each handmade shisa carries maker's genealogical spiritual lineage and blessing power.
items.desc_ja: 手捏形成での指圧パターン、回転速度、焼成温度による霊的意図の転移技法。製作者の系統霊力と祝福力が各シーサーに符号化される知識

items.title_en: Burial Site Cardinal Direction and Mountain-Water Balance Selection
items.title_ja: 埋葬地点方位山水均衡選地法
items.desc_en: Geomantic knowledge of selecting burial locations considering cardinal directions, mountain backdrop proximity, water source distance, and wind exposure. Practitioners assess ancestor communication accessibility and protection of deceased spirits based on topographical cosmic alignment principles.
items.desc_ja: 方位、山背景距離、水源距離、風通し評価による埋葬地選定。祖先との通信可能性と死霊保護の宇宙配置原理判定技法

items.title_en: Kawara Red Tile Overlapping Pattern Typhoon Resistance Engineering
items.title_ja: 瓦赤瓦重ねかけ台風耐性工学
items.desc_en: Technical knowledge of overlapping red ceramic tiles with specific angle and overlap ratios to redirect typhoon winds without displacement. Craftspeople understand wind pressure distribution, weight balance, and seasonal tile re-securing rituals to maintain structural integrity against extreme weath
items.desc_ja: 台風風圧分散のための瓦重ね角度と重複率の工学知識。風圧分布、重量均衡、季節補強儀式による極端気象耐性構造維持技法

items.title_en: Kaa Spring Classification and Seasonal Purity Assessment Protocol
items.title_ja: カー水源分類季節浄化評価儀式
items.desc_en: Traditional classification system distinguishing spring types (surface, deep, iron-rich) and assessing water purity through observation of mineral deposits, insect presence, and plant growth patterns. Seasonal assessments determine safe drinking windows and ritual purification timing for hija commun
items.desc_ja: 湧水種別（表流、深層、含鉄）分類と鉱物沈着、昆虫存在、植物成長観察による浄化評価。季節判定と共有井戸使用儀式浄化タイミング知識

items.title_en: Coral Limestone Quarrying and Seasonal Timing
items.title_ja: 珊瑚石採掘の季節的タイミング知識
items.desc_en: Knowledge of optimal seasons for extracting coral limestone blocks from quarries, considering water levels, weather patterns, and stone quality. Different quarry zones near Naha, Shuri, and northern regions required specific extraction calendars tied to lunar phases and typhoon cycles.
items.desc_ja: サンゴ石採掘の最適季節を判定する知識。水位、気象、石質を考慮し、旧暦や台風周期と連動する採掘暦を各採石地域で継承。

items.title_en: Asagi Structural Load Distribution in Open-Sided Halls
items.title_ja: アサギの開放型構造における荷重分散知識
items.desc_en: Engineering knowledge of how asagi communal houses distribute weight through pillar placement without interior walls, enabling large open spaces. Specific timber selection, joinery angles, and foundation stone positioning prevented collapse during typhoons while maintaining spatial openness for vill
items.desc_ja: アサギの柱配置と荷重分散技術。内壁なしで大空間を実現しながら台風耐性を持つ構造知識を継承。石礎と継手角度の精密性。

items.title_en: Deigo Tree Planting for Spiritual Boundary Marking
items.title_ja: デイゴ樹の精神的領域境界標識知識
items.desc_en: Sacred knowledge of planting deigo (coral tree) at village boundaries and sacred spaces to spiritually demarcate zones. Tree growth patterns, blooming timing, and placement angles relative to cardinal directions created invisible spiritual boundaries recognized through communal memory and seasonal o
items.desc_ja: 村境や聖域に植えるデイゴの精神的な境界標識機能。樹木の成長パターン、開花時期、方位角に基づく配置が目に見えない領域境界を創出。

items.title_en: Kaa Spring Classification and Water Quality Assessment
items.title_ja: カー湧水の分類と水質評価体系
items.desc_en: Traditional taxonomy distinguishing multiple kaa (spring) types by mineral content, flow rate, temperature, and seasonal variation. Knowledge included identifying agarikaa (declining springs), agemaikaa (rising springs), and seasonal fluctuations used to predict drought or flooding, maintaining vill
items.desc_ja: カーの分類体系：ミネラル含有量、流量、温度、季節変動による判別。枯れ方、湧き方の季節予測で村の水資源管理を実現。

items.title_en: Red Tile Overlapping Technique for Typhoon Directionality
items.title_ja: 台風方向性に対応した赤瓦重ね技法
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of varying tile overlap angles and ridge configurations based on prevailing typhoon wind directions for each Okinawan region. Northern, central, and southern districts employed distinct kawara-yaki overlap patterns and ridge rope tensions adapted to local historical storm traje
items.desc_ja: 地域ごとの台風風向に対応した瓦重ね角度と棟構成の変化。北部、中部、南部で異なる風向パターンに合わせた重なり角度と綱張力を調整。

items.title_en: Gajumaru Root System Spatial Planning in Compounds
items.title_ja: ガジュマルの根系展開と敷地計画知識
items.desc_en: Knowledge of accommodating gajumaru (banyan tree) root expansion in residential compounds without structural damage. Practitioners understood root directional growth patterns, seasonal expansion rates, and integration with stone foundations and water drainage systems for multigenerational sustainabi
items.desc_ja: ガジュマルの根系展開パターンと敷地内配置知識。根の方向的成長、季節的拡張速度、石礎や排水との統合で複世代的持続性を実現。

items.title_en: Tsuboya Shisa Clay Body Density and Firing Temperature Calibration
items.title_ja: 壺屋シーサーの粘土密度と焼成温度調整知識
items.desc_en: Craft knowledge specific to Tsuboya shisa makers regarding clay body density variations for different regional markets and kiln types. Temperature gradients within traditional kilns required precise positioning and timing knowledge passed through family lineages, affecting protective spiritual effic
items.desc_ja: 壺屋シーサー職人の粘土密度調整知識。従来の窯内温度勾配に対応した配置と焼成タイミング。家系継承の精密技術で霊的効能を決定。

items.title_en: Ishidatami Path Gradient and Drainage Calculation
items.title_ja: 石畳道の勾配と排水計算知識
items.desc_en: Mathematical knowledge embedded in traditional stone-paved path construction, calculating subtle gradients to manage water flow without visible slope markers. Practitioners used stone size variation, spacing patterns, and surface arrangement to achieve imperceptible drainage directing water toward v
items.desc_ja: 石畳の勾配と排水計算知識。目に見えない傾斜で水流を操作し、石のサイズ変化と配置パターンで井戸や田圃へ誘導。

items.title_en: Burial Site Wind Shadow and Microclimate Selection
items.title_ja: 墓地選定の風影と微気候判定知識
items.desc_en: Geomantic knowledge for identifying optimal burial sites by assessing wind shadow patterns created by surrounding topography and vegetation. Practitioners evaluated soil moisture retention, temperature stability, and annual wind patterns to select locations protecting ancestral remains while maintai
items.desc_ja: 周囲地形と植生による風影パターン判定。土壌水分保持、温度安定性、年間風パターンを評価し、祖霊保護と生者との精神的連結を実現。

items.title_en: White Plaster Color Stability and Humidity Response Knowledge
items.title_ja: 白漆喰の色安定性と湿度応答知識
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of white plaster composition adjustments for different Okinawan regions accounting for humidity levels, salt spray exposure, and seasonal temperature fluctuations. Practitioners modified shell-lime ratios and curing times to maintain ritual purity symbolism while resisting envi
items.desc_ja: 地域の湿度、塩分飛散、季節温度変化に対応した白漆喰配合知識。貝灰比率と養生時間の調整で儀礼的純潔性と耐久性を両立。

items.title_en: パナリヤーマーぬ前の海(民謡の部)
items.title_ja: パナリヤーマーぬ前の海(民謡の部)
items.desc_en: Okinawa designated cultural property: パナリヤーマーぬ前の海(民謡の部). Category: 市町村指定無形民俗文化財. Type: その他. Location: 竹富町.
items.desc_ja: 竹富町の市町村指定無形民俗文化財（その他）

items.title_en: Sabani: Traditional Okinawan Fishing Boat Construction
items.title_ja: サバニ：沖縄伝統漁船の建造技術
items.desc_en: Traditional fishing boat built without nails using the hagi technique (edge-joining planks). Wood selection (typically sugi cedar or Okinawan pine), waterproofing with tree sap, and hull shape optimization for reef navigation represent centuries of accumulated maritime craft knowledge. Annual sabani
items.desc_ja: 釘を使わず矧ぎ技法で板を接合する伝統漁船。杉や琉球松の木材選定、樹脂による防水、珊瑚礁航行用の船体形状最適化が数百年の海洋工芸知識を体現。年次のサバニレースが伝統を継承。

items.title_en: Uminchu: Fisherman's Sea Reading and Current Knowledge
items.title_ja: 海人（ウミンチュ）：漁師の海読みと潮流知識
items.desc_en: Traditional ecological knowledge of Okinawan fishermen (uminchu) including reading wave patterns, predicting currents from cloud formations and wind shifts, and understanding fish behavior by season, moon phase, and tide. Knowledge is transmitted orally through generations of fishing families, often
items.desc_ja: 海人が持つ伝統生態学的知識：波のパターン判読、雲と風からの潮流予測、季節・月齢・潮汐による魚の行動理解。漁師の家系で口頭伝承され、多くは場所固有の専門知識として伝えられる。

items.title_ja: サンゴ礁生態系の伝統的管理
items.desc_en: Okinawan fishing communities developed sophisticated management systems for coral reef resources including seasonal closures (kinjiki), territorial fishing rights by village, and selective harvesting practices. Knowledge of reef zones, spawning seasons, and species interactions enabled sustainable r
items.desc_ja: 沖縄漁業共同体が発展させたサンゴ礁資源管理体系：禁漁期（キンジキ）、集落別の漁業権、選択的採取慣行。礁域・産卵期・種間関係の知識が数百年の持続的資源利用を可能にした。

items.title_ja: サバニ船の建造
items.desc_en: Traditional wooden fishing boat design and construction using local timber. Sabani boats feature distinctive curved prows and shallow drafts, enabling navigation through Okinawan coral reefs and shallow waters while maintaining excellent seaworthiness for offshore fishing expeditions.
items.desc_ja: 地元産の木材を使用した伝統的な木造漁船の設計と建造。独特の湾曲した船首と浅い喫水線を特徴とし、サンゴ礁と浅瀬での航行性能に優れている。

items.title_ja: 海人の漁撈技術
items.desc_en: Comprehensive fishing knowledge and techniques practiced by uminchu (sea people). Encompasses rod fishing, net casting, diving techniques, and seasonal fish behavior understanding. Uminchu possess deep ecological knowledge of marine ecosystems and sustainable resource management developed over gener
items.desc_ja: 海人による包括的な漁撈知識と技術。竿釣り、投網、潜水技術、季節的な魚の習性理解を含む。複数世代にわたって発展した海洋生態系と持続可能な資源管理の深い知識を持つ。

items.title_ja: サンゴ礁航法
items.desc_en: Navigation expertise through complex coral reef systems without modern instruments. Uminchu use wave patterns, star positions, reef formations, and water color variations to determine location and safe passage. This knowledge ensures successful fishing trips and safe return through treacherous reef
items.desc_ja: 最新の機器を使わないサンゴ礁複雑系の航法専門知識。波のパターン、星の位置、礁石の形成、水の色の変化を使用して位置確認と安全な航路を決定する。

items.title_ja: 海藻採取と加工
items.desc_en: Traditional harvesting of edible seaweeds including mozuku and ito-mozuku from coastal waters. Knowledge includes identification of species, optimal harvest timing, processing methods for preservation, and nutritional applications. Sustainable collection practices ensure seaweed bed regeneration and
items.desc_ja: モズク、イトモズクを含む食用海藻の伝統的採取。種の同定、最適採取時期、保存加工方法、栄養応用を含む。持続可能な採取慣行で海藻床の再生を確保する。

items.title_ja: 伝統的な塩づくり
items.desc_en: Sea salt production using evaporation and crystallization methods from coastal seawater. Traditional methods involve specific timing, water temperature management, and clay basin techniques. Salt served essential roles in food preservation, trade, and ceremonial practices throughout Okinawan history
items.desc_ja: 沿岸海水からの蒸発・結晶化法による海塩生産。特定の時期、水温管理、粘土盆地技術を含む伝統的方法。塩は食品保存、交易、儀礼的慣行で重要な役割を果たしてきた。

items.title_ja: 天体航法
items.desc_en: Sophisticated understanding of star positions, constellations, and seasonal celestial movements for ocean navigation. Uminchu memorized star charts and developed mental maps of the night sky to determine direction and latitude while fishing or trading across East China Sea waters.
items.desc_ja: 海洋航法のための星位置、星座、季節的天体運動の高度な理解。海人は星図を暗記し、夜空の心的地図を開発して東シナ海での漁業・貿易中に方角と緯度を決定する。

items.title_ja: 魚種識別と習性知識
items.desc_en: Comprehensive knowledge of fish species found in Okinawan waters, including seasonal migration patterns, spawning behaviors, and habitat preferences. Uminchu understand relationships between lunar cycles, water temperature, and fish abundance, informing optimal fishing timing and location selection.
items.desc_ja: 沖縄海域の魚種の包括的知識。季節的回遊パターン、産卵行動、生息地選好を含む。海人は月齢、水温と魚の豊度の関係を理解し、最適な漁獲時期と位置選択を決定する。

items.title_ja: 潜水技術と真珠採取
items.desc_en: Traditional diving methods for harvesting pearls, abalone, and sea urchins from seafloor. Techniques include breath control, depth awareness, and underwater navigation. Ama (female divers) and male divers developed specialized skills for extended underwater stays in tropical waters.
items.desc_ja: 真珠、アワビ、ウニを海底から採取する伝統的潜水方法。呼吸制御、深度認識、水中航法を含む。アマと男性潜水夫は熱帯海域での長時間水中滞在の専門技術を開発した。

items.title_ja: 季節漁撈暦
items.desc_en: Traditional lunar and solar calendar system coordinating fishing activities with seasonal changes. Knowledge encompasses monsoon patterns, typhoon seasons, fish migration cycles, and optimal fishing windows. This calendar system guided sustainable resource management and community fishing scheduling
items.desc_ja: 漁撈活動と季節変化を調整する伝統的太陰太陽暦体系。モンスーンパターン、台風季、魚の回遊周期、最適漁獲期間を包括する。この暦体系は何世紀にもわたって持続可能な資源管理と地域漁撈計画を導いた。

items.title_en: Net Weaving and Fishing Gear Maintenance
items.title_ja: 網製造と漁具保守
items.desc_en: Traditional craftsmanship in net weaving, rope making, and fishing gear construction using natural fibers. Knowledge includes knot types, mesh sizes appropriate for different fish species, and maintenance techniques for gear longevity. This knowledge preserved fishing equipment quality across genera
items.desc_ja: 天然繊維を使用した網製造、綱製造、漁具建造の伝統工芸。結び目の種類、異なる魚種に適したメッシュサイズ、機器寿命の保守技術を含む。この知識は複数世代にわたって漁具の質を保存した。

items.title_ja: サバニの双船体構造技法
items.desc_en: Traditional method of constructing Sabani boats with distinctive double hulls, using local wood species and hand-carved joinery. Knowledge includes wood selection, hull shaping, and waterproofing with natural materials passed through generations.
items.desc_ja: 地元の木材を使用したサバニの双船体構造の伝統的な構築方法。木材選別、船体成形、天然素材による防水処理の知識が世代を超えて受け継がれている。

items.title_ja: 海人による星座航法
items.desc_en: Ancient seafaring knowledge using Okinawan star patterns and celestial markers for ocean navigation. Uminchu fishermen memorized specific star positions throughout seasons to determine direction and fishing ground locations without instruments.
items.desc_ja: 沖縄の星座と天体標識を使用した海洋航法の古代知識。海人漁師は季節を通じた特定の星の位置を暗記し、道具なしで方角と漁場位置を決定した。

items.title_en: Coral Reef Mapping and Fish Species Recognition
items.title_ja: 珊瑚礁の地形把握と魚種認識
items.desc_en: Detailed knowledge of coral reef formations, underwater topography, and fish behavior patterns. Uminchu developed sophisticated understanding of seasonal fish migrations and optimal diving depths based on reef structure observation.
items.desc_ja: 珊瑚礁の形成、水中地形、魚の行動パターンに関する詳細な知識。海人は礁構造観察に基づいた季節的な魚の移動と最適な潜水深度の洗練された理解を発展させた。

items.title_ja: 女性による海藻採取と加工
items.desc_en: Traditional female knowledge of seaweed identification, sustainable harvesting methods, and food preparation. Women collected and dried various seaweed species for nutritional and medicinal purposes, maintaining ecological balance through seasonal collection practices.
items.desc_ja: 海藻の同定、持続可能な採取方法、食品調理に関する伝統的な女性の知識。女性は季節的な採取慣行を通じて生態系のバランスを保ちながら、栄養と医療目的で様々な海藻を採取・乾燥させた。

items.title_en: Traditional Salt Production from Sea Water
items.title_ja: 海水からの伝統的製塩
items.desc_en: Ancient salt-making process using sun evaporation and natural filtering methods unique to Okinawan coastal areas. Knowledge includes optimal seasons for salt production, water source selection, and crystallization techniques developed over centuries.
items.desc_ja: 沖縄沿岸地域に固有の太陽蒸発と自然濾過方法を使用した古代製塩プロセス。製塩の最適季節、水源選別、数世紀にわたって開発された結晶化技術の知識。

items.title_en: Sabani Sail Design and Wind Reading
items.title_ja: サバニの帆設計と風読み
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge of sail construction and manipulation for Sabani boats, including cloth selection and rigging techniques. Uminchu developed sophisticated understanding of seasonal wind patterns and techniques for rapid sail adjustment during navigation.
items.desc_ja: サバニボートの帆構造と操作に関する伝統的な知識。布地選別とリギング技術を含む。海人は季節風パターンと航行中の急速な帆調整技術の洗練された理解を発展させた。

items.title_en: Diving Technique for Deep Water Pearls and Shells
items.title_ja: 深海真珠と貝殻採取のための潜水技術
items.desc_en: Specialized diving methods for harvesting pearls, shells, and ocean resources from deep waters. Practitioners mastered breath control, depth adaptation, and underwater object recognition, maintaining cultural practices while maximizing sustainable resource extraction.
items.desc_ja: 深海から真珠、貝殻、海洋資源を採取するための特殊な潜水方法。実践者は呼吸制御、深度適応、水中物体認識に習熟し、文化的慣行を維持しながら持続可能な資源採取を最大化した。

items.title_en: Ocean Current and Tide Prediction Knowledge
items.title_ja: 海流と潮汐予測の知識
items.desc_en: Traditional understanding of ocean currents, tidal cycles, and seasonal water temperature variations. Uminchu used environmental observations—water color, animal behavior, and atmospheric signs—to predict tides and currents without modern instruments.
items.desc_ja: 海流、潮汐サイクル、季節的な水温変化の伝統的な理解。海人は水の色、動物の行動、大気の兆候などの環境観察を使用して、現代的な機器なしに潮汐と海流を予測した。

items.title_ja: 持続可能な漁場ローテーション慣行
items.desc_en: Collective knowledge system for rotating fishing grounds seasonally to maintain fish populations and ecosystem health. Communities practiced cooperative resource management, determining which reef areas required rest periods based on observed catch patterns and ecological indicators.
items.desc_ja: 魚の個体群と生態系の健全性を維持するための季節的漁場ローテーションの集団知識体系。コミュニティは観察された漁獲パターンと生態学的指標に基づいて、どの礁地域が休止期間を必要とするかを決定し、協力的な資源管理を実行した。

items.title_en: Magical and Spiritual Fishing Rituals and Incantations
items.title_ja: 漁撈に関する魔術的・精神的儀式と呪文
items.desc_en: Ritualistic practices and verbal incantations performed before and during fishing expeditions to ensure safety and abundant catches. Uminchu believed specific prayers and ceremonial practices appeased sea spirits and strengthened connections between human and ocean realms.
items.desc_ja: 漁撈遠征の前後に行われる儀式的慣行と言語的呪文。海人は特定の祈りと儀式的慣行が海の精霊を鎮め、人間と海域領域の結びつきを強化すると信じていた。

items.title_ja: サバニ船体建造技法
items.desc_en: Traditional wooden boat construction method using curved planks without nails. Craftsmen shape timber through experience, creating flexible vessels suited for Okinawan reef navigation and fishing operations.
items.desc_ja: 釘を使わず曲げた板を組み立てるサバニの伝統的船体建造法。熟練職人が経験により木材を加工し、琉球の漁業に適した柔軟な船を製造する。

items.title_ja: 海人の魚知識体系
items.desc_en: Comprehensive understanding of fish species behavior, migration patterns, and seasonal availability developed through generations of observation. Knowledge encompasses fish ecology, breeding seasons, and optimal catching methods.
items.desc_ja: 世代を通じて観察により発展した魚の習性、回遊パターン、季節的出現を理解する体系。生態、産卵期、最適な漁法を包含する知識。

items.title_ja: サンゴ礁生態系管理
items.desc_en: Traditional practices for sustaining coral reef resources through selective harvesting and reef rotation. Communities maintain ecological balance by understanding species interdependence and implementing sustainable fishing zones.
items.desc_ja: 選別的採取と海域輪作により、サンゴ礁資源を持続させる伝統的実践。種間関係を理解し、持続可能な漁業区域を管理する。

items.title_ja: 伝統的製塩技法
items.desc_en: Ancient salt-making process using shallow evaporation ponds and seawater concentration techniques. Methods produce mineral-rich salt essential for food preservation, trade goods, and ceremonial uses in Okinawan communities.
items.desc_ja: 浅い蒸発池と海水濃縮技術を用いた古代製塩過程。食料保存、交易品、儀式用途に不可欠なミネラル豊富な塩を生産する。

items.title_ja: 星位置による天体航法
items.desc_en: Sophisticated navigation system using star patterns, constellations, and seasonal star positions to determine direction and location at sea. Navigators memorize stellar maps and interpret celestial movements for long-distance voyages.
items.desc_ja: 星パターン、星座、季節的星位置を用い、海上での方向と位置を決定する高度な航法。航海者は星図を記憶し天体運動を解釈する。

items.title_ja: 波と海流の読み方
items.desc_en: Expert interpretation of ocean wave patterns, water currents, and tidal movements to navigate and predict fishing conditions. Knowledge gained through decades of observation enables safe navigation in reef-filled waters.
items.desc_ja: 海波パターン、水流、潮の動きを解釈し、航海と漁況を予測する専門知識。数十年の観察経験により礁海での安全航海を実現する。

items.title_ja: 漁場マーカー識別法
items.desc_en: Traditional system using natural landmarks, rock formations, and coastal features to identify productive fishing zones. Communities maintain shared mental maps enabling precise navigation to specific grounds without modern instruments.
items.desc_ja: 天然の目印、岩層、沿岸地形を用いて豊富な漁場を識別する伝統的体系。共有される心的地図により現代的器具なしで正確な航海を実現。

items.title_ja: サバニ帆走技術の習熟
items.desc_en: Specialized skills for operating traditional outrigger canoes under sail, including balance, trim adjustment, and responsive handling in strong currents. Sailors develop intuitive body control through years of continuous practice.
items.desc_ja: 帆走による伝統双胴船操作の専門技能、バランス調整、強い海流への対応的操舵を含む。年間の継続練習により直感的身体制御を発展させる。

items.title_ja: 海洋気象予測体系
items.desc_en: Indigenous meteorological knowledge using cloud formations, wind patterns, ocean surface conditions, and animal behavior to forecast weather changes. System enables fishers to anticipate dangerous conditions and plan voyages safely.
items.desc_ja: 雲形、風パターン、海面状態、動物行動を用いた気象変化予測の先住民的知識。漁師が危険な状況を予測し安全な航海計画を立案できる。

items.title_en: Inno Fish Weir Construction and Tidal Synchronization
items.title_ja: イノー魚垣の構築と潮汐同期法
items.desc_en: Traditional method of constructing bamboo and stone fish weirs (inno) synchronized with tidal cycles. Knowledge includes optimal placement angles, material selection for durability in salt water, and seasonal maintenance protocols specific to Okinawan reef environments.
items.desc_ja: 潮汐サイクルに同期したイノー魚垣の構築伝統法。塩水耐久性のための材料選定、最適な配置角度、沖縄礁環境固有の季節保守プロトコル。

items.title_en: Mozuku Kelp Phenological Calendar and Harvest Timing
items.title_ja: モズク海藻表現型暦と収穫タイミング
items.desc_en: Detailed calendrical knowledge for Cladosiphon okamuranus harvesting cycles based on water temperature gradients, lunar phases, and nutrient density indicators. Includes species variation recognition across Okinawan waters and optimal blade maturity assessment techniques.
items.desc_ja: 水温勾配、月齢、栄養密度指標に基づくモズク収穫サイクル暦知識。沖縄海域での種変異認識、最適葉成熟度評価技術を含む。

items.title_en: Kerama Sabani Hull Design: Wave Deflection Engineering
items.title_ja: 慶良間サバニ船殻設計：波動偏向工学
items.desc_en: Specialized hull construction knowledge for Kerama sabani fishing vessels, featuring unique curved keel designs that deflect waves while maintaining stability in typhoon-prone waters. Construction methods preserve traditional proportions without written specifications.
items.desc_ja: 慶良間サバニ漁船の特殊船殻構築知識。台風多発海域で安定性を保ちながら波を偏向する独特弧状竜骨設計。仕様書なしに伝統比率を保持。

items.title_en: Reef Flat (Inoo) Micro-Zone Navigation and Resource Mapping
items.title_ja: 礁平原（イノー）微細域ナビゲーションと資源マッピング
items.desc_en: Extensive knowledge system mapping specific resource zones within shallow reef flats, identifying safe passage channels, shellfish habitats, and danger areas through water color gradations, bottom composition recognition, and landmark triangulation without modern instruments.
items.desc_ja: 浅礁平原内の特定資源域マッピング知識体系。水色勾配、底質認識、ランドマーク三角測量により安全航路、貝類生息地、危険域を識別。

items.title_en: Moon Phase Tide Prediction Without Astronomical Instruments
items.title_ja: 天体儀器なしの月相潮汐予測法
items.desc_en: Complex oral tradition for predicting tidal patterns using lunar phase observation, wind direction shifts, and water color transformation. Includes regional variations across Okinawa, Miyako, and Yaeyama islands with accuracy comparable to modern tide tables.
items.desc_ja: 月相観察、風向転換、水色変化を用いた潮汐パターン予測の複雑な口頭伝統。沖縄、宮古、八重山島嶼の地域変異。現代潮汐表に匹敵する精度。

items.title_en: Umibudo Sea Grape Farming: Temperature and Salinity Micro-Management
items.title_ja: ウミブドウ海葡萄養殖：温度塩分微細管理
items.desc_en: Sophisticated cultivation knowledge for Caulerpa lentillifera involving precise water temperature and salinity bracketing, substrate preparation using specific sand compositions, and growth acceleration techniques passed through family lineages in Okinawa and Ishigaki.
items.desc_ja: カウレルパ・レンティリフェラの精密培養知識。水温塩分枠設定、特定砂構成による基質準備、石垣・沖縄の家系を通じた成長促進技術。

items.title_en: Aguni Island Salt Production: Solar Evaporation Timing and Mineral Retention
items.title_ja: 粟国島塩製造：太陽蒸発タイミングと鉱物保持法
items.desc_en: Traditional salt production knowledge specific to Aguni island, involving seawater selection from specific reef zones, multi-stage solar evaporation with precise timing, and mineral composition preservation techniques that create distinctly flavored crystalline salt.
items.desc_ja: 粟国島固有の伝統塩製造知識。特定礁域からの海水選定、精密タイミングの多段階太陽蒸発、異なった風味結晶塩を生成する鉱物組成保持技術。

items.title_en: Taku Octopus Pot Placement: Behavioral Ecology Knowledge
items.title_ja: タク章魚壷配置：行動生態学知識
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of octopus behavior patterns, including preference for specific rock sizes, water temperature zones, and current velocity conditions. Placement strategies maximize catch while utilizing hand-woven ceramic pot designs refined over centuries.
items.desc_ja: 章魚の行動パターン知識。特定岩石サイズ、水温域、流速条件への好適性。数世紀精緻化した手織陶製壷設計を活用した配置戦略で漁獲最大化。

items.title_en: Ama Pearl Diver Breath Control and Underwater Pressure Physiology
items.title_ja: アマ真珠潜水夫呼吸制御と水中圧力生理学
items.desc_en: Female-specific diving knowledge encompassing breath-hold maximization, pressure equalization techniques, hypothermia management, and optimal dive timing coordinated with tidal cycles. Transmitted exclusively through female lineages with ritualized apprenticeship protocols.
items.desc_ja: 息止め最大化、圧力均衡技法、低体温管理、潮汐同期の最適潜水タイミング。女性系統専用伝承、儀式化した弟子修行プロトコル。

items.title_en: Underwater Stone Fish Traps (Ishigaki): Placement Geometry and Maintenance Cycles
items.title_ja: 水中石魚垣（石垣）：配置幾何学と保守サイクル
items.desc_en: Complex knowledge of constructing and maintaining permanent underwater stone structures that funnel fish into collection zones. Includes optimal geometric angles, seasonal repair protocols, and survival strategies during typhoon events that reshape reef topography.
items.desc_ja: 魚を集約域へ漏斗状に導く恒久的水中石構造の構築・保守知識。最適幾何角度、季節修復プロトコル、礁地形を再構成する台風生存戦略。

items.title_en: Inno Fish Weir Construction and Seasonal Placement
items.title_ja: イノー（魚垣）の構築と季節的配置
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge of building inno fish weirs using stone and wooden stakes, understanding tidal currents to trap migratory fish species. Requires expertise in reef topology, material selection, and optimal placement timing during specific lunar phases for maximum catch efficiency.
items.desc_ja: 石と木製の杭を用いたイノー魚垣の構築法。潮流を利用して回遊魚を捕獲する技術。礁の地形把握、材料選定、最適な配置時期の決定が必要。

items.title_en: Moon Phase Calendar for Tide Prediction and Fish Migration
items.title_ja: 潮汐予測と魚類回遊の月齢暦
items.desc_en: Okinawan lunar calendar system correlating moon phases with tidal patterns and fish spawning cycles. Fishermen memorized specific astronomical positions indicating optimal fishing windows for different species, combining astronomical observation with accumulated ecological knowledge.
items.desc_ja: 月の満ち欠けと潮汐パターン、魚類産卵周期を関連付ける暦法。特定の天体位置が各魚種の最適漁期を示す。天文観測と生態知識の融合。

items.title_en: Kerama Sabani Design Principles for Open Ocean Navigation
items.title_ja: 慶良間サバニの外洋航海設計原理
items.desc_en: Specialized boat-building knowledge unique to Kerama Islands, emphasizing hull shape and ballast distribution for stable ocean navigation. Design features adapted shallow draft capability with high stability in rough seas, enabling long-distance fishing trips across Okinawan waters.
items.desc_ja: 慶良間諸島独特の船舶建造知識。船体形状と重心配置により外洋安定性を確保。浅吃水と高い復原性で長距離漁業を可能にする設計。

items.title_en: Water Color Interpretation for Underwater Reef Conditions
items.title_ja: 水色解読による水中礁況判定
items.desc_en: Expert visual reading technique analyzing subtle water color variations indicating reef depth, current patterns, fish presence, and underwater geology. Experienced fishermen decode turquoise, indigo, and dark blue hues to navigate safely and locate productive fishing zones without modern instruments
items.desc_ja: 水色の微細な変化から礁の深さ、潮流、魚群、海底地形を判定する視覚的読解術。青緑色、紺色、濃紺色の色調から安全航行と漁場特定。

items.title_en: Umibudo Farming Phenology and Optimal Harvest Windows
items.title_ja: ウミブドウ栽培の生育段階と最適収穫時期
items.desc_en: Knowledge system for cultivating sea grape (Caulerpa lentillifera) including water temperature thresholds, salinity preferences, and growth cycle monitoring. Harvesters identify peak ripeness by color intensity and texture, timing collection to coincide with market demand while maintaining sustainab
items.desc_ja: ウミブドウ栽培の水温閾値、塩分適正、生育周期監視。色調と食感から熟度判定し最適収穫時期を決定。市場需要と持続可能性のバランス。

items.title_en: Mozuku Seasonal Cultivation and Disease Prevention Methods
items.title_ja: モズク季節栽培と病害対策法
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge governing Cladosiphon okamuranus cultivation timing, water quality management, and pest prevention without chemical inputs. Farmers monitor spore release periods, water temperature fluctuations, and parasitic epiphyte growth, using natural methods preserving ecosystem integrity
items.desc_ja: モズク栽培の時期設定、水質管理、無化学物質病害対策。胞子放出周期、水温変化、寄生付着藻の監視。生態系保全型自然農法。

items.title_en: Taku Octopus Pot Design and Behavioral Luring Techniques
items.title_ja: タク（蛸壺）の設計と習性誘引技法
items.desc_en: Traditional octopus trap construction using clay or ceramic vessels, incorporating design features exploiting octopus shelter-seeking behavior. Specialists possess knowledge of optimal pot size, entrance positioning, bait selection, and seasonal placement depth coordinating with octopus breeding and
items.desc_ja: 陶製蛸壺の設計と蛸の隠れ場所探索習性の利用。壺サイズ、入口位置、餌選定、季節的配置深度の最適化。産卵・脱皮周期との連動。

items.title_en: Aguni Traditional Salt Production and Crystallization Timing
items.title_ja: 粟国塩の伝統製塩と結晶化タイミング
items.desc_en: Historical knowledge of seawater evaporation and salt crystallization specific to Aguni Island's mineral-rich waters. Producers coordinate evaporation processes with wind patterns, humidity levels, and seasonal weather variations, achieving unique mineral compositions and crystalline structures valu
items.desc_ja: 粟国島の塩分豊富な海水の蒸発と塩析出。風向、湿度、季節気象との連動。独特のミネラル成分と結晶構造の実現。伝統調理での価値。

items.title_en: Ama Pearl Diving Breath Control and Depth Assessment Techniques
items.title_ja: アマ潜水の呼吸管理と水深判定技法
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of breath-hold diving physiology developed through generational practice by female ama divers. Techniques include hyperventilation protocols, depth perception through water pressure sensation, underwater orientation without instruments, and recovery methods ensuring diver safet
items.desc_ja: 女性アマ潜水士による呼吸止め潜水の生理学的知識。過呼吸プロトコル、水圧感覚による水深知覚、器具なし水中方向感覚、回復法。

items.title_en: Dugong Avoidance Taboos and Marine Mammal Encounter Protocols
items.title_ja: ジュゴン回避禁忌と海生哺乳類遭遇規約
items.desc_en: Religious and ecological knowledge system governing respectful coexistence with endangered dugongs and whales. Fishermen observe seasonal feeding zone boundaries, acoustic communication signals indicating presence, and ritual protocols preventing harmful encounters. Knowledge reinforces sustainable
items.desc_ja: ジュゴン・鯨との尊重ある共存を統治する宗教・生態知識。季節給餌域の境界遵守、音声信号の認識、接触防止儀礼。精神的敬意による海洋資源持続管理。

items.title_en: Inno Fish Weir Construction and Placement
items.title_ja: イノー魚垣の構築と配置
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge of building and positioning inno—stationary fish weirs constructed from stone and coral branches in shallow reef zones. Encompasses site selection based on tidal flow patterns, seasonal fish migration routes, and structural durability against typhoon conditions.
items.desc_ja: 浅瀬のサンゴと石で構築した定置魚垣。潮流パターン、季節的な魚の移動経路、台風対策を考慮した配置と構築技術

items.title_en: Taku Octopus Pot Baiting and Placement Strategy
items.title_ja: タコ壺の餌付けと設置戦略
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of preparing and deploying taku (earthenware octopus pots) including optimal bait selection by season, depth calculation for different reef zones, and multi-generational understanding of octopus behavioral patterns and hiding preferences.
items.desc_ja: 季節ごとの適切な餌選び、異なるサンゴ礁ゾーンでの深さ計算、タコの行動パターンと隠れ場所の知識

items.title_en: Sabani Hull Design Variations by Regional Waters
items.title_ja: 地域別サバニ船体設計の違い
items.desc_en: Distinct sabani boat construction methods from Itoman, Nago, Kerama, and Miyako regions, each adapted to local sea conditions. Knowledge includes hull angle modifications, timber selection, draft depth adjustments for distinct reef and current patterns specific to each region.
items.desc_ja: 糸満、名護、慶良間、宮古各地のサバニ建造技術。局所的な海況に適応した船体形状、木材選定、喫水深調整

items.title_en: Water Color and Luminescence Reading for Navigation and Fish Location
items.title_ja: 水色と発光による航海と魚群探知
items.desc_en: Traditional method of reading water coloration and bioluminescent patterns at night to determine location, detect fish presence, and predict weather changes. Incorporates understanding of plankton blooms, phosphorescence timing, and color variation across specific reef zones.
items.desc_ja: 昼間の水色変化と夜間の生物発光から位置確認と魚群検出。プランクトン増殖、発光タイミング、特定サンゴ礁ゾーンの色彩変化

items.title_en: Umibudo Seasonal Growth Cycle and Selective Harvesting
items.title_ja: ウミブドウの季節成長と選別収穫
items.desc_en: Detailed understanding of sea grape (Caulerpa lentillifera) growth patterns across seasons, identifying optimal harvest windows based on frond maturity and texture quality. Includes knowledge of water temperature correlation, nutrient-rich zone identification, and sustainability practices.
items.desc_ja: 季節ごとの成長パターン、房の成熟度と食感による最適収穫時期。水温相関、栄養豊富ゾーン特定、持続可能性

items.title_en: Aguni Island Solar Salt Production and Crystallization
items.title_ja: 粟国島天日塩の結晶化過程
items.desc_en: Traditional salt-making knowledge specific to Aguni Island including seawater evaporation timing, salt pan maintenance, crystallization observation, and mineral quality assessment. Encompasses understanding of optimal wind conditions, humidity levels, and seasonal timing.
items.desc_ja: 粟国島独特の海水蒸発タイミング、塩田管理、結晶化観察、鉱物品質評価。風速、湿度、季節的タイミングの理解

items.title_en: Moon Phase Tide Prediction and Lunar Calendar Integration
items.title_ja: 月齢潮汐予測と陰暦統合
items.desc_en: Complex knowledge system linking lunar phases to tidal patterns, incorporating traditional Okinawan lunar calendar systems. Includes understanding of spring tides during new and full moons, neap tides, and regional tide amplitude variations across different island locations.
items.desc_ja: 月齢と潮汐リンク、沖縄陰暦統合。大潮（新月・満月）、小潮、島ごとの潮位振幅変化の理解

items.title_en: Underwater Stone Fish Trap Maintenance and Seasonal Repair
items.title_ja: 水中石魚垣の保守と季節的修復
items.desc_en: Knowledge of maintaining submerged stone fish trap structures including damage assessment from typhoons, seasonal coral growth management, and structural reinforcement techniques. Incorporates understanding of water pressure dynamics and material degradation patterns.
items.desc_ja: 台風被害評価、季節的なサンゴ成長管理、構造補強技術。水圧力学と材料劣化パターンの理解

items.title_en: Ama Pearl Diving Breath Control and Depth Endurance Training
items.title_ja: アマ真珠潜水呼吸法と深度耐久訓練
items.desc_en: Specialized respiratory techniques and physical conditioning methods for ama divers including breath-holding progression, pressure equalization, cold-water adaptation, and cardiovascular training regimens. Knowledge passed through generations of diving families and mentorship.
items.desc_ja: 段階的な息止め、圧力均等化、冷水適応、心肺持久力訓練。潜水家族と師弟関係を通じた伝承

items.title_en: Mozuku Spore Collection and Cultivation Substrate Preparation
items.title_ja: モズク胞子採取と培養基質準備
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge of collecting Cladosiphon okamuranus spores during specific reproduction periods and preparing substrates for cultivation. Includes understanding of water temperature requirements, substrate material selection, and microbial balance maintenance for optimal seaweed growth.
items.desc_ja: 繁殖期の胞子採取、培養基質準備。水温要件、基質材料選定、微生物バランス維持

items.title_en: Inno Fish Weir Construction and Placement
items.title_ja: イノー(魚垣)の構築と配置技術
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge of building stone fish weirs in shallow reef zones, including selection of optimal tidal zones, stone arrangement patterns for directing fish flow, seasonal placement timing, and maintenance protocols specific to different reef environments and target species.
items.desc_ja: 浅瀬の魚垣構築における石の配置パターン、潮流利用、季節ごとの設置位置決定、各礁帯の環境に応じた維持管理の技術体系。

items.title_en: Moon Phase and Lunar Tide Prediction System
items.title_ja: 月齢と潮汐予測の伝統暦法
items.desc_en: Ancient Okinawan system for predicting tidal patterns, fish behavior cycles, and optimal fishing days based on lunar phases, celestial observations, and interconnected seasonal markers. Includes specialized calendar notation and oral mnemonic devices passed through fishing communities.
items.desc_ja: 月齢、天体観測、季節マーカーに基づく潮汐予測と魚の行動周期の暦法体系。漁村で受け継がれた専門暦記法と口頭記憶装置。

items.title_en: Mizukara Water Color Reading for Fish Detection
items.title_ja: 水色判読による魚群探知法
items.desc_en: Sophisticated visual interpretation technique identifying fish species, abundance, and depth by analyzing subtle water color variations, light refraction patterns, and surface disturbances. Knowledge encompasses understanding of seasonal water clarity changes and species-specific indicators.
items.desc_ja: 水の色合い、光の屈折、水面の変化から魚種・個体数・深度を判読する視覚技術。季節による透明度変化と魚種特有の指標を含む。

items.title_en: Umibudo Farm Bed Preparation and Tidal Management
items.title_ja: 海ぶどう養殖床の潮流管理と床造成
items.desc_en: Traditional cultivation methods for sea grape (Caulerpa lentillifera) involving selection of optimal shallow water zones, construction of anchoring systems resistant to typhoon currents, seasonal seeding practices, and water quality monitoring techniques developed over centuries.
items.desc_ja: 海ぶどう養殖における適地選定、台風対応の固定技術、季節播種法、水質管理。数世紀の試行錯誤から確立された技法体系。

items.title_en: Aguni Salt Production: Solar Evaporation Cycles
items.title_ja: 粟国塩の天日塩田製塩法と季節周期
items.desc_en: Specialized salt production knowledge from Aguni Island involving seawater intake timing, multi-stage evaporation bed management, crystallization monitoring, and weather prediction for optimal drying conditions. Includes understanding of salt mineral composition and quality grading.
items.desc_ja: 粟国島の海水取水タイミング、多段階塩田管理、結晶化監視、天候予測と塩の鉱物組成・品質格付けの知識体系。

items.title_en: Taku Octopus Pot Design and Placement Patterns
items.title_ja: タコツボの設計と海底配置の技法
items.desc_en: Knowledge of constructing clay and ceramic octopus pots (taku) with optimal internal chambers, designing placement patterns across reef bottoms to maximize octopus attraction, understanding octopus territorial behavior, and seasonal arrangement adjustments based on breeding cycles.
items.desc_ja: タコツボの内部構造設計、礁底への配置パターン、タコの領域行動理解、繁殖周期に応じた季節配置変更の技術。

items.title_en: Sabani Hull Design Variations by Regional Waters
items.title_ja: 地域別サバニ船型設計と流域適応
items.desc_en: Differentiated sabani boat construction techniques reflecting specific regional characteristics: Itoman's rough open-ocean designs, Nago's calm harbor adaptations, Kerama's inter-island traversal hulls, and Miyako's deep-water variations. Knowledge encompasses wood selection, hull curvature calculat
items.desc_ja: 糸満の外洋型、名護の静穏港湾型、慶良間の島間航行型、宮古の深海型設計。木材選定、船体曲線計算、バラスト配分の知識。

items.title_en: Mozuku Harvesting Cycle and Blade Preservation
items.title_ja: モズク採取周期と茎葉保護技術
items.desc_en: Traditional knowledge of Cladosiphon okamuranus seasonal growth patterns, optimal harvesting windows during spring months, selective blade-cutting techniques preserving root systems for regeneration, and post-harvest processing methods ensuring quality and sustainability across generations.
items.desc_ja: モズクの季節成長パターン、春期採取の最適タイミング、根系を保護する選別刈取法、収穫後処理による品質確保と持続可能性の知識。

items.title_en: Reef Zone Classification System: Inoo and Uno
items.title_ja: イノーとウノの礁帯分類と生態特性
items.desc_en: Complex Okinawan reef ecosystem classification distinguishing shallow reef flats (inoo) and outer reefs (uno) with named zones reflecting specific depth, coral composition, current patterns, and fish species distribution. Knowledge includes ecological relationships and resource availability calendar
items.desc_ja: 浅礁帯と外礁の特性、水深・造礁珊瑚組成・潮流・魚種分布による命名帯の分類。生態関係と資源季節性の知識体系。

items.title_en: Ama Pearl Diver Diving Techniques and Breath Control
items.title_ja: 海女の潜水技法と呼吸制御法
items.desc_en: Specialized knowledge of female pearl and shell divers (ama) including breath-hold maximization techniques, depth pressure management, underwater pearl bed location recognition, shell selection methods, and physical conditioning practices. Transmission involves ritual initiation and mentorship relat
items.desc_ja: 女性海女の息止め技法、水圧管理、真珠床認識、貝類選別法、身体条件整備。儀式的開始と師弟関係による伝承。

items.title_en: Inoo Reef Flat Navigation by Water Phosphorescence
items.title_ja: イノオ浅瀬の夜光虫による航海術
items.desc_en: Night navigation technique using bioluminescent dinoflagellates in shallow reef flats to identify safe passages and fish concentration zones. Interpreting subtle light patterns distinguishes between sandy channels, coral obstacles, and productive fishing grounds invisible during daylight hours.
items.desc_ja: 夜間の浅瀬航海で夜光虫の発光パターンから安全航路と魚群密集地を識別する技術。微妙な光の変化から砂地、サンゴ礁、好漁場を判別する。

items.title_en: Taku Octopus Pot Placement by Lunar Phenology
items.title_ja: タコ壺設置の月齢生物学的判定
items.desc_en: Indigenous calendar system correlating lunar phases with octopus reproductive cycles and behavioral patterns. Specific moon ages determine optimal pot placement locations, depth adjustments, and recovery timing. Encoded in traditional chants and seasonal markers tied to Okinawan constellations.
items.desc_ja: 月齢とタコの繁殖周期・行動パターンを結びつける独自暦法。特定月齢で壺設置位置や深さ、回収時期を決定。琉球星座と季節標識を含む民謡に暗号化。

items.title_en: Kerama Sabani Hull Timber Selection by Tree Age Reading
items.title_ja: ケラマサバニの樹齢判読による材選別
items.desc_en: Specialized dendrochronological knowledge for selecting optimal timber in Kerama Island shipbuilding. Craftsmen identify tree age through bark characteristics, wood color gradients, and growth ring patterns to ensure planking flexibility and saltwater resistance lasting decades.
items.desc_ja: ケラマ造船でサバニに最適な材木を樹皮特性・色階調・年輪から識別。樹齢判読で数十年の塩水耐性と柔軟性を確保する樹木選別技術。

items.title_ja: 粟国塩の結晶形状による品質診断
items.desc_en: Traditional salt quality assessment through crystalline structure observation. Master salt-makers interpret pyramid versus cubic formations, color variations, and surface texture patterns to determine mineral content, salinity levels, and optimal harvesting windows in sun-drying beds.
items.desc_ja: 結晶形状の観察による塩の品質診断法。ピラミッド状と立方体の形成、色変化、表面質感から鉱物含有量と塩分濃度を判定する製塩職人技。

items.title_en: Okirizushi Stone Fish Trap Weir Placement Geometry
items.title_ja: 沖積石魚塚の幾何学的配置法
items.desc_en: Sophisticated underwater stone trap construction using geometric principles to exploit tidal current patterns and fish schooling behavior. Trapezoid and spiral configurations channel migratory fish into capture zones. Knowledge includes maintenance cycles matching seasonal current shifts.
items.desc_ja: 潮流パターンと魚群行動を利用した石塚の幾何学的配置。台形と螺旋形で回遊魚を捕獲ゾーンへ誘導。季節潮流変化に合わせた維持管理知識を含む。

items.title_ja: モズク着生宿主植物の識別体系
items.desc_en: Indigenous taxonomy distinguishing preferred mozuku substrate plants by microscopic feature analysis and seasonal epiphytic patterns. Specific coralline algae, seagrass species, and rocky surface characteristics indicate high-yield cultivation zones and sustainable harvesting rotation schedules.
items.desc_ja: モズクの着生基質植物を顕微鏡的特徴と季節着生パターンで識別する体系。特定の紅藻・海草・岩石特性から高収量地帯と持続可能な輪作を判定。

items.title_en: Umibudo Salinity Threshold Monitoring by Frond Morphology
items.title_ja: ウミブドウの葉形態による塩分閾値監視
items.desc_en: Real-time water salinity assessment through umibudo frond morphological changes. Farmers observe vesicle turgidity, color transitions, and cellular elasticity to detect salinity stress before crop loss. Correlates with rainfall patterns and groundwater intrusion in coastal farming plots.
items.desc_ja: ウミブドウ葉の形態変化で水塩分をリアルタイム監視。気胞膨圧・色変化・細胞弾性から塩分ストレスを検知。降雨と地下水貫入パターンと相関。

items.title_en: Ama Pearl Diver Breath-Hold Physiology Conditioning
items.title_ja: アマ潜水夫の呼吸制御生理条件付け
items.desc_en: Specialized training regimen developing cardiovascular adaptation for extended breath-hold diving. Ama divers employ progressive depth exposure, breathing rhythm protocols, and mental focus techniques passed through female family lineages. Physiological knowledge includes dangerous narcosis recognit
items.desc_ja: 長時間息止め潜水の心肺適応開発。段階的深度露出、呼吸リズム、集中力技法を女性系統で伝承。窒素酔いの認識と個人限界判定を含む生理知識。

items.title_en: Miyako Sabani Keelless Design Hydrodynamic Adjustment
items.title_ja: 宮古サバニ無竜骨設計の流体力学調整
items.desc_en: Specialized boat design knowledge unique to Miyako Island shipbuilding. Craftsmen compensate for absent keel through precise hull curve angles, weight distribution, and ballast stone placement. Oral calculations encode hydrodynamic principles for stability in shallow reef waters and extreme weather.
items.desc_ja: 宮古造船独特の無竜骨設計知識。船体曲線角度・重心配分・バラスト石配置で竜骨欠損を補完。浅瀬安定と悪天候対応を暗号化した計算法。

items.title_en: Okinawan Wind Direction Prediction from Sea Surface Texture Gradients
items.title_ja: 海面テクスチャ勾配による風向予測
items.desc_en: Advanced meteorological observation technique analyzing ripple patterns, wave crest formations, and wind-driven foam streaks across reef zones. Practitioners identify microwind shift precursors hours before weather transitions. Integrated with traditional chant mnemonics describing eight cardinal di
items.desc_ja: 波紋パターン・波頂形成・風駆動泡筋から微風変化を予測。天候転換数時間前の兆候を識別。八方位と季節風特性を含む民謡記憶術と統合。
